---
title: "Multi-Assembly Comparison Report"
params:
  comparison_tsv: "__COMPARISON_TSV__"
  completeness_tsv: "__COMPLETENESS_TSV__"
  ref_lengths_tsv: "__REF_LENGTHS_TSV__"
  per_assembly_summary_tsvs: "__PER_ASM_TSVS__"
  assembly_names: "__ASM_NAMES__"
  per_assembly_macro_blocks_tsvs: "__PER_ASM_MACRO_TSVS__"
  per_assembly_rdna_arrays_tsvs: "__PER_ASM_RDNA_TSVS__"
  per_assembly_contaminants_tsvs: "__PER_ASM_CONTAM_TSVS__"
  per_assembly_agp_tsvs: "__PER_ASM_AGP_TSVS__"
  pairwise_macro_blocks_tsvs: "__PAIRWISE_MACRO_TSVS__"
  pairwise_names: "__PAIRWISE_NAMES__"
  reference_name: "__REFNAME__"
  synteny_mode: "__SYNTENY_MODE__"
  chr_like_minlen: "__CHRLIKE__"
  out_prefix: "__OUTPREFIX__"
output:
  html_document:
    self_contained: __SELF_CONTAINED__
    css: "__COMMON_CSS__"
    toc: true
    toc_float:
      collapsed: false
    toc_depth: 2
    theme: flatly
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 10, dpi = 150)

# Optional chunk timing: set FINAL_FINALIZER_PROFILE=1 to log per-chunk
# elapsed time to stderr (shown by refresh_reports.py).
if (nzchar(Sys.getenv("FINAL_FINALIZER_PROFILE"))) {
  .chunk_timers <- new.env(parent = emptyenv())
  .setup_t0 <- proc.time()["elapsed"]
  knitr::knit_hooks$set(chunk_timer = function(before, options, envir) {
    label <- options$label
    if (before) {
      .chunk_timers[[label]] <- proc.time()["elapsed"]
    } else {
      elapsed <- proc.time()["elapsed"] - .chunk_timers[[label]]
      cat(sprintf("[timing] %-35s %5.1fs\n", label, elapsed), file = stderr())
    }
  })
  knitr::opts_chunk$set(chunk_timer = TRUE)
}

source("__COMMON_R__")
pacman::p_load(ggridges)

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Comparison-report-specific helpers
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
fmt_pct <- function(x) ifelse(is.na(x), "\u2014", sprintf("%.1f%%", x * 100))

# Assembly color palette (one color per assembly)
asm_pal <- c(oi[5], oi[1], oi[3], oi[6], oi[7], oi[4], oi[2], oi[8], oi[9])

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Subgenome detection and color setup
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
ref_lengths <- read_tsv(params$ref_lengths_tsv, show_col_types = FALSE,
                        col_types = cols(subgenome = col_character()))
list2env(setup_subgenomes(ref_lengths), envir = environment())

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Load data
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
comp_df <- read_tsv(params$comparison_tsv, show_col_types = FALSE)
compl_df <- read_tsv(params$completeness_tsv, show_col_types = FALSE)

n_asm <- nrow(comp_df)
asm_names <- comp_df$assembly
asm_colors <- setNames(rep_len(asm_pal, n_asm), asm_names)

# Load per-assembly summary TSVs
asm_tsv_paths <- strsplit(params$per_assembly_summary_tsvs, ";")[[1]]
asm_name_list <- strsplit(params$assembly_names, ";")[[1]]

per_asm_summaries <- list()
for (i in seq_along(asm_tsv_paths)) {
  p <- asm_tsv_paths[i]
  if (nzchar(p) && file.exists(p)) {
    df <- read_tsv(p, show_col_types = FALSE,
                   col_types = cols(assigned_subgenome = col_character()))
    df$assembly <- asm_name_list[i]
    per_asm_summaries[[i]] <- df
  }
}
all_summary_df <- if (length(per_asm_summaries) > 0) bind_rows(per_asm_summaries) else NULL
has_per_asm <- !is.null(all_summary_df) && nrow(all_summary_df) > 0

has_any_chrom <- any(comp_df$n_chrom_assigned > 0, na.rm = TRUE)
has_any_contam <- any(comp_df$n_contaminants > 0, na.rm = TRUE)
has_any_depth <- any(!is.na(comp_df$mean_chrom_depth) & comp_df$mean_chrom_depth > 0)

chr_like_minlen <- as.numeric(params$chr_like_minlen)

# PDF output paths
pdf_classbar <- paste0(params$out_prefix, ".classification_comparison.pdf")
pdf_heatmap  <- paste0(params$out_prefix, ".chromosome_completeness.pdf")

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Load per-assembly macro_blocks and pairwise macro_blocks for synteny plot
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
per_asm_macro_paths <- if (nzchar(params$per_assembly_macro_blocks_tsvs))
  strsplit(params$per_assembly_macro_blocks_tsvs, ";")[[1]] else character(0)
pairwise_macro_paths <- if (nzchar(params$pairwise_macro_blocks_tsvs))
  strsplit(params$pairwise_macro_blocks_tsvs, ";")[[1]] else character(0)
pairwise_pair_names <- if (nzchar(params$pairwise_names))
  strsplit(params$pairwise_names, ";")[[1]] else character(0)

# Load per-assembly macro_blocks (ref->asm) and tag with assembly name
per_asm_macro_list <- list()
for (i in seq_along(per_asm_macro_paths)) {
  p <- per_asm_macro_paths[i]
  if (nzchar(p) && file.exists(p)) {
    df <- read_tsv(p, show_col_types = FALSE,
                   col_types = cols(subgenome = col_character()))
    if (nrow(df) > 0) {
      df$assembly <- asm_name_list[i]
      per_asm_macro_list[[i]] <- df
    }
  }
}
per_asm_macro_df <- if (length(per_asm_macro_list) > 0) bind_rows(per_asm_macro_list) else NULL

# Load pairwise macro_blocks (asm->asm)
pairwise_macro_list <- list()
for (i in seq_along(pairwise_macro_paths)) {
  p <- pairwise_macro_paths[i]
  if (nzchar(p) && file.exists(p)) {
    df <- read_tsv(p, show_col_types = FALSE,
                   col_types = cols(subgenome = col_character()))
    if (nrow(df) > 0 && i <= length(pairwise_pair_names)) {
      df$pair_name <- pairwise_pair_names[i]
      clean_name <- sub("^rescue:", "", pairwise_pair_names[i])
      # Extract left and right assembly names from pair name
      parts <- strsplit(clean_name, "_vs_", fixed = TRUE)[[1]]
      if (length(parts) >= 2) {
        df$left_assembly <- parts[1]
        df$right_assembly <- paste(parts[-1], collapse = "_vs_")
      } else {
        warning(sprintf("Cannot parse pairwise pair name: %s", pairwise_pair_names[i]))
        next
      }
      pairwise_macro_list[[i]] <- df
    }
  }
}
pairwise_macro_df <- if (length(pairwise_macro_list) > 0) bind_rows(pairwise_macro_list) else NULL

# Synteny data available for both nucleotide and protein modes
has_synteny_data <- !is.null(per_asm_macro_df) && nrow(per_asm_macro_df) > 0

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Load per-assembly rDNA arrays TSVs
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
rdna_arrays_paths <- if (nzchar(params$per_assembly_rdna_arrays_tsvs))
  strsplit(params$per_assembly_rdna_arrays_tsvs, ";")[[1]] else character(0)

rdna_arrays_list <- list()
for (i in seq_along(rdna_arrays_paths)) {
  p <- rdna_arrays_paths[i]
  if (nzchar(p) && file.exists(p)) {
    df <- read_tsv(p, show_col_types = FALSE)
    if (nrow(df) > 0) {
      df$assembly <- asm_name_list[i]
      rdna_arrays_list[[i]] <- df
    }
  }
}
all_rdna_arrays_df <- if (length(rdna_arrays_list) > 0) bind_rows(rdna_arrays_list) else NULL
has_rdna_arrays <- !is.null(all_rdna_arrays_df) && nrow(all_rdna_arrays_df) > 0

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Load per-assembly contaminants TSVs (for Top Taxa section)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
contam_tsv_paths <- if (nzchar(params$per_assembly_contaminants_tsvs))
  strsplit(params$per_assembly_contaminants_tsvs, ";")[[1]] else character(0)

contam_detail_list <- list()
for (i in seq_along(contam_tsv_paths)) {
  p <- contam_tsv_paths[i]
  if (nzchar(p) && file.exists(p)) {
    df <- read_tsv(p, show_col_types = FALSE)
    if (nrow(df) > 0) {
      df$assembly <- asm_name_list[i]
      contam_detail_list[[i]] <- df
    }
  }
}
all_contam_detail_df <- if (length(contam_detail_list) > 0) bind_rows(contam_detail_list) else NULL
has_contam_detail <- !is.null(all_contam_detail_df) && nrow(all_contam_detail_df) > 0

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Load per-assembly AGP files (for scaffold join indicators in synteny plot)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
agp_paths <- if (nzchar(params$per_assembly_agp_tsvs))
  strsplit(params$per_assembly_agp_tsvs, ";")[[1]] else character(0)

# Parse AGP into a single dataframe with scaffold component and gap info
agp_list <- list()
for (i in seq_along(agp_paths)) {
  p <- agp_paths[i]
  if (nzchar(p) && file.exists(p)) {
    raw <- read_tsv(p, comment = "#", col_names = FALSE, show_col_types = FALSE)
    if (nrow(raw) >= 6) {
      # W rows = components, U/N rows = gaps
      df <- raw %>%
        transmute(
          scaffold = X1,
          start = as.numeric(X2),
          end = as.numeric(X3),
          part_num = as.integer(X4),
          type = X5,
          component = if_else(X5 == "W", X6, NA_character_),
          comp_start = if_else(X5 == "W", as.numeric(X7), NA_real_),
          comp_end = if_else(X5 == "W", as.numeric(X8), NA_real_),
          strand = if_else(X5 == "W", X9, NA_character_)
        )
      df$assembly <- asm_name_list[i]
      agp_list[[i]] <- df
    }
  }
}
all_agp_df <- if (length(agp_list) > 0) bind_rows(agp_list) else NULL
# Pre-index AGP by (assembly, scaffold) for O(1) lookup in synteny plot
agp_idx <- if (!is.null(all_agp_df) && nrow(all_agp_df) > 0) {
  split(all_agp_df, paste(all_agp_df$assembly, all_agp_df$scaffold, sep = "\x01"))
} else { NULL }

# Build contig_new â†’ scaffold mapping for ribbon matching.  When a scaffold
# contains multiple components (e.g., chr1P from chr1P_f1 + chr1P_f2), the
# per-assembly macro_blocks use individual contig names (contig_new = chr1P_f1)
# but the pill uses the scaffold name (chr1P).  This map resolves the mismatch.
# Key: assembly::contig_new â†’ scaffold name
contig_to_scaffold <- NULL
if (exists(".setup_t0")) {
  cat(sprintf("[timing] setup                              %5.1fs\n",
      proc.time()["elapsed"] - .setup_t0), file = stderr())
}
```

---

<p class="section-intro">
**Reference**: `r if (nchar(params$reference_name) > 0) params$reference_name else "\u2014"` &emsp;
**Synteny mode**: `r params$synteny_mode` &emsp;
**Assemblies**: `r n_asm` &emsp;
**Date**: `r Sys.Date()`
</p>

# 1. Assembly Overview {.tabset}

```{r compleasm_setup, include=FALSE}
# Check if compleasm data is available in comparison TSV
has_compleasm <- "compleasm_chrs_S" %in% names(comp_df) &&
  any(!is.na(comp_df$compleasm_chrs_S) & comp_df$compleasm_chrs_S != "", na.rm = TRUE)
```

## Classification

```{r classification_table, eval=has_per_asm, results='asis'}
# Summarise per assembly Ă— classification
clf_wide <- all_summary_df %>%
  group_by(assembly, classification) %>%
  summarise(total_mb = sum(length, na.rm = TRUE) / 1e6,
            n_contigs = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = classification,
    values_from = c(total_mb, n_contigs),
    values_fill = list(total_mb = 0, n_contigs = 0L)
  )

# Ensure all classification columns exist (even if no assembly has them)
for (cl in classification_levels) {
  mb_col <- paste0("total_mb_", cl)
  if (!mb_col %in% names(clf_wide)) clf_wide[[mb_col]] <- 0
}

# Build stacked bar SVG
clf_colors <- unname(classification_colors[classification_levels])

make_clf_bar <- function(...) {
  vals <- as.numeric(c(...))
  total <- sum(vals, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (is.na(total) || total == 0) return("")
  bar_w <- 200; bar_h <- 14; x <- 0; rects <- ""
  for (j in seq_along(vals)) {
    w <- vals[j] / total * bar_w
    if (!is.na(w) && w > 0.1) {
      rects <- paste0(rects, sprintf(
        '<rect x="%.1f" y="0" width="%.1f" height="%d" fill="%s"/>', x, w, bar_h, clf_colors[j]))
      x <- x + w
    }
  }
  sprintf('<svg width="%d" height="%d" style="vertical-align:middle" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">%s</svg>',
          bar_w, bar_h, rects)
}

mb_cols <- paste0("total_mb_", classification_levels)

clf_table <- clf_wide %>%
  mutate(assembly = factor(assembly, levels = asm_names)) %>%
  arrange(assembly) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(bar = make_clf_bar(!!!syms(mb_cols))) %>%
  ungroup()

# Select and rename columns for gt
clf_gt_df <- clf_table %>%
  select(Assembly = assembly, bar, all_of(mb_cols))

# Short column labels
clf_short <- c(
  "chrom_assigned"     = "Chr",
  "chrom_unassigned"   = "Unasgn",
  "organelle_complete" = "Org",
  "organelle_debris"   = "OrgD",
  "rDNA"               = "rDNA",
  "contaminant"        = "Cont",
  "chrom_debris"       = "ChrD",
  "debris"             = "Debris",
  "unclassified"       = "Unclf"
)

col_labels <- setNames(
  as.list(c("", clf_short[classification_levels])),
  c("bar", mb_cols)
)

# Drop columns that are all zero
nonzero_mb <- mb_cols[sapply(mb_cols, function(col) any(clf_gt_df[[col]] > 0))]
zero_mb <- setdiff(mb_cols, nonzero_mb)

clf_gt_df %>%
  { if (length(zero_mb) > 0) select(., -all_of(zero_mb)) else . } %>%
  gt() %>%
  fmt(columns = bar, fns = function(x) lapply(x, html)) %>%
  fmt_number(columns = any_of(nonzero_mb), decimals = 1) %>%
  cols_label(.list = col_labels[c("bar", nonzero_mb)]) %>%
  cols_width(bar ~ px(220)) %>%
  cols_width(any_of(nonzero_mb) ~ px(52)) %>%
  cols_align(align = "right", columns = any_of(nonzero_mb)) %>%
  tab_header(
    title = md("**Classification**"),
    subtitle = "Mb per category"
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note(md(paste0(
    paste(sapply(classification_levels[classification_levels %in%
      sub("total_mb_", "", nonzero_mb)], function(cl) {
      sprintf('<span style="display:inline-block;width:12px;height:12px;background:%s;margin-right:3px;vertical-align:middle;"></span>%s',
              classification_colors[cl], classification_labels[cl])
    }), collapse = " &nbsp; ")
  ))) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = css(vertical_align = "middle"),
    locations = cells_body()
  ) %>%
  gt_theme()
```

`r if (has_compleasm) "## BUSCO Completeness" else ""`

```{r compleasm_table, eval=has_compleasm, results='asis'}
busco_colors <- c(
  "Single-copy"  = "#33a2c4",
  "Duplicated"   = "#225ea8",
  "Fragmented"   = "#fdae61",
  "Interspersed" = "#fee08b",
  "Missing"      = "#d73027"
)

make_busco_bar <- function(s, d, f, i, m) {
  vals <- c(s, d, f, i, m)
  cols <- unname(busco_colors)
  total <- sum(vals, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (is.na(total) || total == 0) return("")
  bar_w <- 140; bar_h <- 14; x <- 0; rects <- ""
  for (j in seq_along(vals)) {
    w <- vals[j] / total * bar_w
    if (!is.na(w) && w > 0) {
      rects <- paste0(rects, sprintf(
        '<rect x="%.1f" y="0" width="%.1f" height="%d" fill="%s"/>', x, w, bar_h, cols[j]))
      x <- x + w
    }
  }
  sprintf('<svg width="%d" height="%d" style="vertical-align:middle" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">%s</svg>',
          bar_w, bar_h, rects)
}

# Build wide-format table: one row per assembly, paired columns for chrs / non-chrs
busco_df <- comp_df %>%
  transmute(
    Assembly = assembly,
    chrs_S = as.numeric(compleasm_chrs_S),
    chrs_D = as.numeric(compleasm_chrs_D),
    chrs_F = as.numeric(compleasm_chrs_F),
    chrs_I = as.numeric(compleasm_chrs_I),
    chrs_M = as.numeric(compleasm_chrs_M),
    non_S  = as.numeric(compleasm_non_chrs_S),
    non_D  = as.numeric(compleasm_non_chrs_D),
    non_F  = as.numeric(compleasm_non_chrs_F),
    non_I  = as.numeric(compleasm_non_chrs_I),
    non_M  = as.numeric(compleasm_non_chrs_M)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(chrs_S)) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    chrs_bar = make_busco_bar(chrs_S, chrs_D, chrs_F, chrs_I, chrs_M),
    non_bar  = make_busco_bar(non_S, non_D, non_F, non_I, non_M)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(spacer = "") %>%
  select(Assembly,
         chrs_bar, chrs_S, chrs_D, chrs_F, chrs_I, chrs_M,
         spacer,
         non_bar, non_S, non_D, non_F, non_I, non_M)

lineage_name <- comp_df$compleasm_lineage[!is.na(comp_df$compleasm_lineage) &
                                           comp_df$compleasm_lineage != ""][1]

busco_df %>%
  gt() %>%
  fmt(columns = c(chrs_bar, non_bar), fns = function(x) lapply(x, html)) %>%
  fmt_number(columns = c(chrs_S, chrs_D, chrs_F, chrs_I, chrs_M,
                          non_S, non_D, non_F, non_I, non_M),
             decimals = 1) %>%
  cols_label(
    chrs_bar = "", chrs_S = "% S", chrs_D = "D", chrs_F = "F",
    chrs_I = "I", chrs_M = "M",
    spacer = "",
    non_bar = "", non_S = "% S", non_D = "D", non_F = "F",
    non_I = "I", non_M = "M"
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(label = "Chromosomes",
              columns = c(chrs_bar, chrs_S, chrs_D, chrs_F, chrs_I, chrs_M)) %>%
  tab_spanner(label = "Non-chromosomes",
              columns = c(non_bar, non_S, non_D, non_F, non_I, non_M)) %>%
  cols_width(c(chrs_bar, non_bar) ~ px(160)) %>%
  cols_width(c(chrs_S, chrs_D, chrs_F, chrs_I, chrs_M,
               non_S, non_D, non_F, non_I, non_M) ~ px(48)) %>%
  cols_width(spacer ~ px(6)) %>%
  cols_align(align = "right",
             columns = c(chrs_S, chrs_D, chrs_F, chrs_I, chrs_M,
                          non_S, non_D, non_F, non_I, non_M)) %>%
  tab_header(
    title = md("**BUSCO Completeness**"),
    subtitle = md(sprintf("Lineage: **%s**", lineage_name))
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note(md(paste0(
    '<span style="display:inline-block;width:12px;height:12px;background:', busco_colors[1], ';margin-right:3px;vertical-align:middle;"></span>Single-copy &nbsp; ',
    '<span style="display:inline-block;width:12px;height:12px;background:', busco_colors[2], ';margin-right:3px;vertical-align:middle;"></span>Duplicated &nbsp; ',
    '<span style="display:inline-block;width:12px;height:12px;background:', busco_colors[3], ';margin-right:3px;vertical-align:middle;"></span>Fragmented &nbsp; ',
    '<span style="display:inline-block;width:12px;height:12px;background:', busco_colors[4], ';margin-right:3px;vertical-align:middle;"></span>Interspersed &nbsp; ',
    '<span style="display:inline-block;width:12px;height:12px;background:', busco_colors[5], ';margin-right:3px;vertical-align:middle;"></span>Missing'
  ))) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = css(vertical_align = "middle"),
    locations = cells_body()
  ) %>%
  gt_theme()
```

## Summary Table

```{r overview_table}
# Detect whether reference has a plastid (chrC/chrPt) sequence
ref_has_plastid <- any(grepl("^chr[C]$|^chrPt$", ref_lengths$ref_id))
any_asm_has_chrC <- any(comp_df$chrC_found == "yes", na.rm = TRUE)
show_chrC <- ref_has_plastid || any_asm_has_chrC

tbl <- comp_df %>%
  transmute(
    Assembly = assembly,
    Contigs  = total_contigs,
    `Size (Mb)` = round(total_bp / 1e6, 1),
    N50 = round(n50 / 1e6, 2),
    L50 = l50,
    `Largest (Mb)` = round(largest_contig / 1e6, 1),
    `Asgn / Unasgn / Chim` = paste(n_chrom_assigned, "/",
                                     n_chrom_unassigned, "/",
                                     n_chimeric),
    `Full-length` = n_full_length,
    `Both telo` = n_both_telomeres,
    `Mean ref cov` = ifelse(is.na(mean_ref_coverage), "\u2014",
                            sprintf("%.1f%%", mean_ref_coverage * 100)),
    `Mean identity` = ifelse(is.na(mean_identity), "\u2014",
                             sprintf("%.2f%%", mean_identity * 100)),
    Contaminants = n_contaminants,
    rDNA = n_rdna,
    chrC = ifelse(chrC_found == "yes", "\u2713", "\u2014"),
    chrM = ifelse(chrM_found == "yes", "\u2713", "\u2014")
  )

gt_obj <- tbl %>%
  gt() %>%
  gt_theme() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Assembly Comparison Summary") %>%
  cols_align(align = "right", columns = where(is.numeric)) %>%
  tab_spanner(label = "Contiguity", columns = c(Contigs, `Size (Mb)`, N50, L50, `Largest (Mb)`)) %>%
  tab_spanner(label = "Chromosomes", columns = c(`Asgn / Unasgn / Chim`, `Full-length`, `Both telo`, `Mean ref cov`, `Mean identity`))

# Conditionally include chrC in "Other" spanner
if (show_chrC) {
  gt_obj <- gt_obj %>%
    tab_spanner(label = "Other", columns = c(Contaminants, rDNA, chrC, chrM))
} else {
  gt_obj <- gt_obj %>%
    cols_hide(columns = chrC) %>%
    tab_spanner(label = "Other", columns = c(Contaminants, rDNA, chrM))
}
gt_obj
```

## Nx Curves

```{r nx_curves, fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
if (has_per_asm) {
  # Compute Nx curve for each assembly
  nx_list <- list()
  for (asm in asm_names) {
    asm_df <- all_summary_df %>% filter(assembly == asm)
    lens <- sort(asm_df$length, decreasing = TRUE)
    total <- sum(lens)
    if (total == 0) next
    cum_frac <- cumsum(lens) / total
    # Sample at 1% intervals for smooth curves
    nx_pts <- tibble(nx_pct = 0:100)
    nx_pts$contig_len <- sapply(nx_pts$nx_pct, function(pct) {
      if (pct == 0) return(lens[1])
      idx <- which(cum_frac >= pct / 100)[1]
      if (is.na(idx)) return(lens[length(lens)])
      lens[idx]
    })
    nx_pts$assembly <- asm
    # Compute N50 and N90 for annotation
    n50_val <- nx_pts$contig_len[nx_pts$nx_pct == 50]
    n90_val <- nx_pts$contig_len[nx_pts$nx_pct == 90]
    nx_pts$n50 <- n50_val
    nx_pts$n90 <- n90_val
    nx_list[[asm]] <- nx_pts
  }

  if (length(nx_list) > 0) {
    nx_df <- bind_rows(nx_list) %>%
      mutate(assembly = factor(assembly, levels = asm_names),
             contig_mb = contig_len / 1e6)

    p_nx <- ggplot(nx_df, aes(x = nx_pct, y = contig_mb,
                              color = assembly, group = assembly)) +
      geom_step_interactive(
        aes(tooltip = paste0(assembly, "\nNx", nx_pct, " = ",
                             sprintf("%.2f Mb", contig_mb)),
            data_id = assembly),
        linewidth = 0.8
      ) +
      scale_color_manual(values = asm_colors, name = NULL) +
      labs(x = "Nx (%)", y = "Contig length (Mb)") +
      theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_pt, base_family = base_family) +
      axis_theme +
      theme(legend.position = "bottom")
    p_nx <- apply_legend_theme(p_nx)

    girafe_styled(ggobj = p_nx, width_svg = 10, height_svg = 5)
  } else {
    cat("No contig data available for Nx curves.")
  }
} else {
  cat("Per-assembly contig summary data not available.")
}
```


# 2. Chromosome Assignment {.tabset}

## Overview

```{r completeness_heatmap, fig.width=10, fig.height=max(3, n_asm * 0.35 + 2)}
if (has_any_chrom) {
  # Exclude organelle chromosomes from the heatmap (they have their own section)
  organelle_ids <- ref_lengths %>%
    filter(grepl("^chr[CM]$|^chrPt$|^chrMt$", ref_id)) %>% pull(ref_id)

  # Natural sort reference chromosomes: strip "chr" prefix, sort by subgenome + number
  ref_order <- ref_lengths %>%
    filter(!ref_id %in% organelle_ids) %>%
    mutate(
      chrom_num = as.numeric(str_extract(ref_id, "\\d+")),
      sg = if (has_subgenomes) subgenome else "G"
    ) %>%
    arrange(sg, chrom_num) %>%
    pull(ref_id)

  hm_data <- compl_df %>%
    filter(!ref_id %in% organelle_ids) %>%
    mutate(
      ref_id = factor(ref_id, levels = ref_order),
      assembly = factor(assembly, levels = asm_names),
      best_ref_coverage = as.numeric(best_ref_coverage),
      coverage_pct = ifelse(is.na(best_ref_coverage), 0, best_ref_coverage * 100),
      mean_identity = as.numeric(mean_identity),
      identity_pct = ifelse(is.na(mean_identity), 0, mean_identity * 100)
    )

  # Join subgenome info from ref_lengths
  hm_data <- hm_data %>%
    left_join(ref_lengths %>% select(ref_id, subgenome), by = "ref_id") %>%
    mutate(sg = if (has_subgenomes) subgenome else "G")

  # --- Compute per-cell fill color using per-subgenome gradient ---
  # For each subgenome, gradient from white (0%) to dark subgenome color (100%)
  # Fill intensity is based on mean identity (not reference coverage)
  # Pre-compute color ramps per subgenome (avoid recreating in hot loop)
  sg_ramps <- lapply(setNames(names(sg_cols_dark), names(sg_cols_dark)), function(sg_key) {
    colorRampPalette(c("white", sg_cols_dark[sg_key]))(101)
  })
  compute_sg_fill <- function(identity, sg_val) {
    sg_key <- if (sg_val %in% names(sg_ramps)) sg_val else "NA"
    if (is.na(identity) || identity <= 0) return("#f0f0f0")
    frac <- min(identity / 100, 1)
    sg_ramps[[sg_key]][round(frac * 100) + 1]
  }

  hm_data$cell_fill <- mapply(compute_sg_fill, hm_data$identity_pct, hm_data$sg)

  # --- Off-target coverage computation ---
  # For each (assembly, ref_chromosome), find blocks from contigs NOT assigned to that ref_id
  has_off_target <- FALSE
  if (!is.null(per_asm_macro_df) && has_per_asm) {
    # Build contig-to-assigned mapping
    contig_assigned <- all_summary_df %>%
      filter(classification == "chrom_assigned") %>%
      select(assembly, contig, assigned_ref_id)

    off_target_df <- per_asm_macro_df %>%
      left_join(contig_assigned,
                by = c("assembly", "contig" = "contig")) %>%
      filter(!is.na(assigned_ref_id), ref_id != assigned_ref_id) %>%
      group_by(assembly, ref_id) %>%
      summarise(off_target_bp = sum(union_bp, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
      left_join(ref_lengths %>% select(ref_id, ref_len), by = "ref_id") %>%
      mutate(off_target_pct = off_target_bp / ref_len * 100)

    if (nrow(off_target_df) > 0) {
      has_off_target <- TRUE
      hm_data <- hm_data %>%
        left_join(off_target_df %>% select(assembly, ref_id, off_target_pct),
                  by = c("assembly", "ref_id")) %>%
        mutate(off_target_pct = ifelse(is.na(off_target_pct), 0, off_target_pct))
    }
  }
  if (!has_off_target) {
    hm_data$off_target_pct <- 0
  }

  # --- Compute per-cell telomere status from per-assembly summaries ---
  if (has_per_asm && "has_5p_telomere" %in% names(all_summary_df) &&
      "has_3p_telomere" %in% names(all_summary_df)) {
    telo_info <- all_summary_df %>%
      filter(classification == "chrom_assigned") %>%
      group_by(assembly, assigned_ref_id) %>%
      summarise(
        any_5p = any(has_5p_telomere == "yes", na.rm = TRUE),
        any_3p = any(has_3p_telomere == "yes", na.rm = TRUE),
        .groups = "drop"
      )
    hm_data <- hm_data %>%
      left_join(telo_info, by = c("assembly" = "assembly",
                                   "ref_id" = "assigned_ref_id")) %>%
      mutate(any_5p = ifelse(is.na(any_5p), FALSE, any_5p),
             any_3p = ifelse(is.na(any_3p), FALSE, any_3p))
  } else {
    hm_data <- hm_data %>%
      mutate(any_5p = (has_both_telomeres == "yes"),
             any_3p = (has_both_telomeres == "yes"))
  }

  # Shape status for each cell
  hm_data <- hm_data %>%
    mutate(
      shape_status = case_when(
        n_contigs == 0              ~ "unassigned",
        is_full_length != "yes"     ~ "incomplete",
        any_5p & any_3p             ~ "telo_both",
        any_5p & !any_3p            ~ "telo_5p",
        !any_5p & any_3p            ~ "telo_3p",
        TRUE                        ~ "full_length"
      ),
      multi_label = ifelse(n_contigs > 1, as.character(n_contigs), "")
    )

  # --- Border color: dark subgenome color or red gradient for off-target ---
  compute_offtarget_border <- function(ot_pct) {
    if (is.na(ot_pct) || ot_pct <= 0) return(NA_character_)
    frac <- min(ot_pct / 20, 1)
    ramp <- colorRampPalette(c("#e08080", "#e74c3c"))(101)
    ramp[round(frac * 100) + 1]
  }
  hm_data <- hm_data %>%
    mutate(
      sg_dark_col = unname(sg_cols_dark[ifelse(sg %in% names(sg_cols_dark), sg, "NA")]),
      border_color = ifelse(
        off_target_pct > 0,
        sapply(off_target_pct, compute_offtarget_border),
        darken(sg_dark_col, 0.2)
      ),
      border_lw = ifelse(off_target_pct > 0, 0.6, 0.3),
      tooltip = paste0(
        ref_id, " \u2014 ", assembly, "\n",
        "Contigs: ", n_contigs, "\n",
        "Assigned bp: ", scales::comma(total_assigned_bp), "\n",
        "Best ref coverage: ", fmt_pct(best_ref_coverage), "\n",
        "Mean identity: ", fmt_pct(mean_identity), "\n",
        "Full-length: ", is_full_length, "\n",
        "Telomeres: ", case_when(
          shape_status == "telo_both" ~ "both",
          shape_status == "telo_5p"   ~ "5\u2032 only",
          shape_status == "telo_3p"   ~ "3\u2032 only",
          TRUE ~ "none"
        ),
        ifelse(off_target_pct > 0,
               paste0("\nOff-target: ", sprintf("%.1f%%", off_target_pct)), "")
      )
    )

  # =====================================================================
  # X-axis layout: manual positioning with subgenome gaps
  # =====================================================================
  x_spacing   <- 1.0
  x_group_gap <- 1.8
  ref_layout <- ref_lengths %>%
    filter(!ref_id %in% organelle_ids) %>%
    mutate(
      chrom_num = as.numeric(str_extract(ref_id, "\\d+")),
      sg = if (has_subgenomes) subgenome else "G"
    ) %>%
    arrange(sg, chrom_num)
  sg_groups   <- unique(ref_layout$sg)
  n_sg_groups <- length(sg_groups)

  x_positions <- tibble(ref_id = character(), x_center = numeric(),
                         sg = character(), chrom_label = character())
  x_cursor <- 1.0
  for (sg_i in seq_along(sg_groups)) {
    sg_val  <- sg_groups[sg_i]
    sg_refs <- ref_layout %>% filter(sg == sg_val)
    for (j in seq_len(nrow(sg_refs))) {
      rid <- sg_refs$ref_id[j]
      lbl <- str_replace(rid, "^chr", "")
      if (has_subgenomes) lbl <- str_replace(lbl, "[A-Z]$", "")
      x_positions <- bind_rows(x_positions, tibble(
        ref_id = rid, x_center = x_cursor, sg = sg_val, chrom_label = lbl
      ))
      if (j < nrow(sg_refs)) x_cursor <- x_cursor + x_spacing
    }
    if (sg_i < n_sg_groups) x_cursor <- x_cursor + x_group_gap
  }

  # Y-axis layout
  y_spacing <- 1.0
  y_positions <- tibble(assembly = asm_names,
                         y_center = seq_along(asm_names) * y_spacing)

  # Join positions into hm_data
  hm_data <- hm_data %>%
    mutate(assembly = as.character(assembly),
           ref_id = as.character(ref_id)) %>%
    left_join(x_positions %>% select(ref_id, x_center), by = "ref_id") %>%
    left_join(y_positions, by = "assembly")

  # =====================================================================
  # Polygon construction helpers
  # =====================================================================
  pill_hw     <- 0.30
  rect_hh     <- 0.32   # half-height of core rectangle (straight edges)
  cap_r_val   <- 0.08   # cap extends beyond rect; ratio = 0.32/0.40 = 80%
  jagged_hh   <- 0.34   # slightly taller than rect for zigzag visibility
  n_teeth_val <- 2
  tooth_d_val <- 0.06   # deeper teeth for visibility

  # rect_hh = half-height of core rectangle; caps extend beyond by cr
  make_pill <- function(xc, yc, hw, rh, cr, cap_top, cap_bot, n_arc = 20) {
    rect_top <- yc - rh
    rect_bot <- yc + rh
    x <- c(); y <- c()
    if (cap_top) {
      theta <- seq(0, pi, length.out = n_arc)
      x <- c(x, xc + hw * cos(theta))
      y <- c(y, rect_top - cr * sin(theta))
    } else {
      x <- c(x, xc + hw, xc - hw)
      y <- c(y, rect_top, rect_top)
    }
    x <- c(x, xc - hw); y <- c(y, rect_bot)
    if (cap_bot) {
      theta <- seq(pi, 0, length.out = n_arc)
      x <- c(x, xc + hw * cos(theta))
      y <- c(y, rect_bot + cr * sin(theta))
    } else {
      x <- c(x, xc + hw); y <- c(y, rect_bot)
    }
    tibble(x = x, y = y)
  }

  make_pill_jagged <- function(xc, yc, hw, hh_rect, n_t, tooth_d) {
    top_y <- yc - hh_rect; bot_y <- yc + hh_rect
    tw <- (2 * hw) / n_t
    x <- c(); y <- c()
    for (i in 0:(n_t - 1)) {
      xl <- xc - hw + i * tw; xm <- xl + tw / 2; xr <- xl + tw
      x <- c(x, xl, xm, xr)
      y <- c(y, top_y, top_y + tooth_d, top_y)
    }
    x <- c(x, xc + hw); y <- c(y, bot_y)
    for (i in (n_t - 1):0) {
      xl <- xc - hw + i * tw; xm <- xl + tw / 2; xr <- xl + tw
      x <- c(x, xr, xm, xl)
      y <- c(y, bot_y, bot_y - tooth_d, bot_y)
    }
    tibble(x = x, y = y)
  }

  make_cell_polygon <- function(xc, yc, status) {
    switch(status,
      telo_both   = make_pill(xc, yc, pill_hw, rect_hh, cap_r_val, TRUE, TRUE),
      telo_5p     = make_pill(xc, yc, pill_hw, rect_hh, cap_r_val, TRUE, FALSE),
      telo_3p     = make_pill(xc, yc, pill_hw, rect_hh, cap_r_val, FALSE, TRUE),
      full_length = make_pill(xc, yc, pill_hw, rect_hh, 0, FALSE, FALSE),
      incomplete  = make_pill_jagged(xc, yc, pill_hw, jagged_hh,
                                     n_teeth_val, tooth_d_val),
      unassigned  = make_pill(xc, yc, pill_hw, rect_hh, 0, FALSE, FALSE)
    )
  }

  # =====================================================================
  # Build polygon data frame
  # =====================================================================
  poly_list <- list()
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(hm_data))) {
    row <- hm_data[i, ]
    if (is.na(row$x_center) || is.na(row$y_center)) next
    pts <- make_cell_polygon(row$x_center, row$y_center, row$shape_status)
    pts$cell_id <- i
    pts$fill_color <- if (row$shape_status == "unassigned") "#f0f0f0" else row$cell_fill
    pts$border_color <- if (row$shape_status == "unassigned") NA_character_ else row$border_color
    pts$border_lw <- if (row$shape_status == "unassigned") 0 else row$border_lw
    pts$tooltip <- row$tooltip
    pts$data_id <- paste0(row$ref_id, "_", row$assembly)
    pts$shape_status <- row$shape_status
    poly_list[[i]] <- pts
  }
  all_polys <- bind_rows(poly_list)
  unassigned_polys <- all_polys %>% filter(shape_status == "unassigned")
  assigned_polys   <- all_polys %>% filter(shape_status != "unassigned")
  multi_df <- hm_data %>% filter(multi_label != "")

  # =====================================================================
  # Annotation data
  # =====================================================================
  sg_extent <- x_positions %>%
    group_by(sg) %>%
    summarise(x_min = min(x_center), x_max = max(x_center),
              x_mid = mean(x_center), .groups = "drop")
  y_grid_top   <- min(y_positions$y_center) - 0.5
  chr_label_y1 <- y_grid_top - 0.10   # odd-numbered chromosomes (closer to grid)
  chr_label_y2 <- y_grid_top - 0.35   # even-numbered chromosomes (staggered up)
  x_positions  <- x_positions %>%
    mutate(label_y = ifelse(as.numeric(chrom_label) %% 2 == 0,
                            chr_label_y2, chr_label_y1))
  sep_line_y   <- y_grid_top - 0.65
  sg_label_y   <- y_grid_top - 0.90

  # =====================================================================
  # Compose ggplot
  # =====================================================================
  p_hm <- ggplot()

  # 1. Unassigned placeholders (grey, no border)
  if (nrow(unassigned_polys) > 0) {
    p_hm <- p_hm +
      geom_polygon(data = unassigned_polys,
                   aes(x = x, y = y, group = cell_id),
                   fill = "#f0f0f0", color = NA)
  }

  # 2. Assigned pills (precomputed fill/color via scale_*_identity)
  if (nrow(assigned_polys) > 0) {
    p_hm <- p_hm +
      geom_polygon_interactive(
        data = assigned_polys,
        aes(x = x, y = y, group = cell_id,
            fill = fill_color, color = border_color,
            linewidth = border_lw,
            tooltip = tooltip, data_id = data_id),
        show.legend = FALSE
      ) +
      scale_fill_identity() +
      scale_color_identity() +
      scale_linewidth_identity()
  }

  # 3. Multi-contig count labels (small number inside pill)
  if (nrow(multi_df) > 0) {
    p_hm <- p_hm +
      geom_text(data = multi_df,
                aes(x = x_center, y = y_center, label = multi_label),
                size = base_font_pt / .pt * 0.8, color = "white",
                fontface = "bold", family = base_family)
  }

  # 4. Subgenome separator lines + labels (polyploid only)
  if (has_subgenomes && n_sg_groups >= 2) {
    sg_line_df <- sg_extent %>%
      mutate(y = sep_line_y,
             color = unname(sg_cols_dark[sg]))
    p_hm <- p_hm +
      geom_segment(data = sg_line_df,
                   aes(x = x_min - 0.4, xend = x_max + 0.4,
                       y = y, yend = y),
                   color = sg_line_df$color, linewidth = 0.5) +
      geom_text(data = sg_extent,
                aes(x = x_mid, y = sg_label_y,
                    label = paste0("Subgenome ", sg)),
                size = base_font_pt / .pt, fontface = "bold",
                family = base_family)
  }

  # 5. Chromosome number labels (staggered odd/even to avoid overlap)
  n_chroms <- length(ref_order)
  p_hm <- p_hm +
    geom_text(data = x_positions,
              aes(x = x_center, y = label_y, label = chrom_label),
              size = base_font_pt / .pt, family = base_family,
              hjust = 0.5)

  # 6. Assembly labels (left of grid)
  x_left_edge <- min(x_positions$x_center) - pill_hw - 0.5
  p_hm <- p_hm +
    geom_text(data = y_positions,
              aes(x = x_left_edge, y = y_center, label = assembly),
              size = base_font_pt / .pt, hjust = 1, family = base_family)

  # Scales and theme
  p_hm <- p_hm +
    scale_y_reverse() +
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
    labs(caption = paste0(
      "Pill = telomeres, rect = full-length, zigzag = incomplete, ",
      "grey = unassigned. Fill intensity = mean identity.",
      if (has_off_target) " Red border = off-target synteny." else ""
    )) +
    theme_void(base_size = base_font_pt, base_family = base_family) +
    theme(
      plot.margin = margin(8, 2, 5,
                           max(25, max(nchar(as.character(asm_names))) * 3)),
      plot.caption = element_text(size = 6, hjust = 0, color = "#666")
    )

  # --- Dynamic sizing ---
  n_chroms <- length(ref_order)
  n_sg_gaps <- max(0, n_sg_groups - 1)
  hm_width  <- max(6, n_chroms * 0.45 + n_sg_gaps * 0.8 + 2.5)
  hm_height <- max(3, n_asm * 0.5 + 2.0)

  save_pdf(pdf_heatmap, p_hm, width = min(7.2, hm_width), height = hm_height)
  girafe_styled(ggobj = p_hm,
                width_svg = min(13, hm_width * 1.4),
                height_svg = hm_height)
} else {
  cat("No chromosome-assigned contigs found in any assembly.")
}
```

<div class="note-box">
<b>Legend</b>:&ensp;
<svg width="14" height="24" style="vertical-align:middle"><rect x="1" y="1" width="12" height="22" rx="6" fill="#8cc5e3" stroke="#2a6496" stroke-width="0.8"/></svg>&ensp;Both telomeres&emsp;
<svg width="14" height="24" style="vertical-align:middle"><path d="M1,7 C1,1 13,1 13,7 L13,23 L1,23 Z" fill="#8cc5e3" stroke="#2a6496" stroke-width="0.8"/></svg>&ensp;5&#x2032; telomere&emsp;
<svg width="14" height="24" style="vertical-align:middle"><path d="M1,1 L13,1 L13,17 C13,23 1,23 1,17 Z" fill="#8cc5e3" stroke="#2a6496" stroke-width="0.8"/></svg>&ensp;3&#x2032; telomere&emsp;
<svg width="14" height="20" style="vertical-align:middle"><rect x="1" y="1" width="12" height="18" fill="#8cc5e3" stroke="#2a6496" stroke-width="0.8"/></svg>&ensp;Full-length&emsp;
<svg width="14" height="20" style="vertical-align:middle"><path d="M1,4 L4,1 L7,4 L10,1 L13,4 L13,16 L10,19 L7,16 L4,19 L1,16 Z" fill="#8cc5e3" stroke="#2a6496" stroke-width="0.8"/></svg>&ensp;Incomplete&emsp;
<svg width="14" height="20" style="vertical-align:middle"><rect x="1" y="1" width="12" height="18" fill="#f0f0f0" stroke="none"/></svg>&ensp;Unassigned<br>
Fill intensity = reference coverage. Red border = off-target synteny. Small numbers = multi-contig.
</div>

```{r scatter_setup, eval=(has_any_chrom && has_per_asm), include=FALSE}
scatter_df <- all_summary_df %>%
  filter(classification == "chrom_assigned") %>%
  mutate(
    length_mb = length / 1e6,
    assembly = factor(assembly, levels = asm_names)
  )
if (has_subgenomes && "assigned_subgenome" %in% names(scatter_df)) {
  scatter_df <- scatter_df %>%
    mutate(sg = ifelse(is.na(assigned_subgenome) | assigned_subgenome == "NA",
                       "Other", assigned_subgenome))
} else {
  scatter_df$sg <- "All"
}
has_scatter_ident <- "seq_identity_vs_ref" %in% names(scatter_df) &&
                     !all(is.na(scatter_df$seq_identity_vs_ref))
has_scatter_cov   <- "ref_coverage" %in% names(scatter_df) &&
                     !all(is.na(scatter_df$ref_coverage))
```

```{r scatter_identity_header, eval=(has_any_chrom && has_per_asm && exists("has_scatter_ident") && has_scatter_ident), results='asis'}
cat("## Length vs Identity\n\n")
```

```{r scatter_identity, eval=(has_any_chrom && has_per_asm && exists("has_scatter_ident") && has_scatter_ident), fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
si_df <- scatter_df %>% filter(!is.na(seq_identity_vs_ref))

p_si <- ggplot(si_df, aes(x = length_mb, y = seq_identity_vs_ref * 100,
                           color = assembly)) +
  geom_point_interactive(
    aes(tooltip = paste0(assembly, "\n", contig, "\n",
                         ifelse(!is.na(assigned_ref_id),
                                paste0("Assigned: ", assigned_ref_id, "\n"), ""),
                         sprintf("%.1f Mb, %.2f%% identity", length_mb,
                                 seq_identity_vs_ref * 100))),
    alpha = 0.6, size = 2
  ) +
  { if (has_subgenomes && length(unique(si_df$sg)) > 1) {
    facet_wrap(~ sg)
  }} +
  scale_color_manual(values = asm_colors, name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(40, 100), breaks = seq(40, 100, 10)) +
  labs(x = "Contig length (Mb)", y = "Sequence identity vs reference (%)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_pt, base_family = base_family) +
  axis_theme +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
p_si <- apply_legend_theme(p_si)

girafe_styled(ggobj = p_si, width_svg = 10, height_svg = 6)
```

```{r scatter_coverage_header, eval=(has_any_chrom && has_per_asm && exists("has_scatter_cov") && has_scatter_cov), results='asis'}
cat("## Length vs Ref Coverage\n\n")
```

```{r scatter_coverage, eval=(has_any_chrom && has_per_asm && exists("has_scatter_cov") && has_scatter_cov), fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
sc_df <- scatter_df %>% filter(!is.na(ref_coverage))

p_sc <- ggplot(sc_df, aes(x = length_mb, y = ref_coverage * 100, color = assembly)) +
  geom_point_interactive(
    aes(tooltip = paste0(assembly, "\n", contig, "\n",
                         ifelse(!is.na(assigned_ref_id),
                                paste0("Assigned: ", assigned_ref_id, "\n"), ""),
                         sprintf("%.1f Mb, %.1f%% ref coverage", length_mb,
                                 ref_coverage * 100))),
    alpha = 0.6, size = 2
  ) +
  { if (has_subgenomes && length(unique(sc_df$sg)) > 1) {
    facet_wrap(~ sg)
  }} +
  scale_color_manual(values = asm_colors, name = NULL) +
  labs(x = "Contig length (Mb)", y = "Reference coverage (%)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_pt, base_family = base_family) +
  axis_theme +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
p_sc <- apply_legend_theme(p_sc)

girafe_styled(ggobj = p_sc, width_svg = 10, height_svg = 6)
```

```{r completeness_table_setup, include=FALSE}
# Prepare completeness table data with subgenome info and natural sort
if (has_any_chrom) {
  compl_tbl_base <- compl_df %>%
    mutate(best_ref_coverage = as.numeric(best_ref_coverage),
           mean_identity = as.numeric(mean_identity)) %>%
    left_join(ref_lengths %>% select(ref_id, subgenome), by = "ref_id") %>%
    filter(!grepl("^chr[CM]$|^chrPt$|^chrMt$", ref_id)) %>%
    mutate(
      sg = if (has_subgenomes) subgenome else "G",
      chrom_num = as.numeric(str_extract(ref_id, "\\d+")),
      `Assigned (Mb)` = round(total_assigned_bp / 1e6, 1),
      `Ref cov (%)` = ifelse(is.na(best_ref_coverage), "\u2014",
                             sprintf("%.1f", best_ref_coverage * 100)),
      `Identity (%)` = ifelse(is.na(mean_identity), "\u2014",
                              sprintf("%.2f", mean_identity * 100)),
      `Full-length` = ifelse(is_full_length == "yes", "\u2713", ""),
      `Both telo` = ifelse(has_both_telomeres == "yes", "\u2713", "")
    ) %>%
    arrange(sg, chrom_num) %>%
    mutate(ref_id = factor(ref_id, levels = unique(ref_id)))

  compl_sg_levels <- if (has_subgenomes) sort(unique(compl_tbl_base$sg)) else "G"

  make_compl_gt <- function(df, title) {
    df %>%
      select(ref_id, assembly, n_contigs, `Assigned (Mb)`, `Ref cov (%)`,
             `Identity (%)`, `Full-length`, `Both telo`) %>%
      gt(groupname_col = "ref_id") %>%
      gt_theme() %>%
      tab_header(title = title) %>%
      cols_label(
        assembly = "Assembly", n_contigs = "Contigs",
        `Assigned (Mb)` = "Assigned (Mb)",
        `Ref cov (%)` = "Ref cov (%)",
        `Identity (%)` = "Identity (%)",
        `Full-length` = "Full-length",
        `Both telo` = "Both telo"
      ) %>%
      cols_align(align = "right", columns = c(n_contigs, `Assigned (Mb)`,
                                               `Ref cov (%)`, `Identity (%)`)) %>%
      cols_align(align = "center", columns = c(`Full-length`, `Both telo`))
  }
}
```

`r if (has_any_chrom && has_subgenomes && length(compl_sg_levels) >= 2) "## Completeness Table {.tabset}" else "## Completeness Table"`

```{r completeness_table_single, eval=(has_any_chrom && !(has_subgenomes && length(compl_sg_levels) >= 2))}
make_compl_gt(compl_tbl_base, "Chromosome Completeness by Reference")
```

```{r completeness_table_tabset, eval=(has_any_chrom && has_subgenomes && length(compl_sg_levels) >= 2), results='asis'}
for (sg_val in compl_sg_levels) {
  cat(sprintf("\n### Subgenome %s\n\n", sg_val))
  sg_df <- compl_tbl_base %>% filter(sg == sg_val)
  gt_out <- make_compl_gt(sg_df,
    sprintf("Chromosome Completeness \u2014 Subgenome %s", sg_val))
  # Render gt to HTML and emit inline
  cat(as.character(as_raw_html(gt_out)))
  cat("\n\n")
}
```

```{r completeness_table_none, eval=(!has_any_chrom)}
cat("No chromosome-assigned contigs found in any assembly.")
```


```{r synteny_pre, eval=has_synteny_data, include=FALSE}
# Pre-compute subgenome count before the section header so we can
# conditionally add {.tabset} for polyploid references.
has_named_subgenomes <- any(
  !is.na(ref_lengths$subgenome) & ref_lengths$subgenome != "NA"
)
if (has_named_subgenomes) {
  n_subgenomes_pre <- ref_lengths %>%
    filter(!is.na(subgenome) & subgenome != "NA") %>%
    pull(subgenome) %>% unique() %>% length()
} else {
  n_subgenomes_pre <- 1
}
```

`r if (has_synteny_data && exists("n_subgenomes_pre") && n_subgenomes_pre > 1) "# 3. Macro Synteny {.tabset}" else if (has_synteny_data) "# 3. Macro Synteny" else ""`

```{r synteny_setup, eval=has_synteny_data, include=FALSE}
# =========================================================================
# Section 3: Macro Synteny Riparian Plot (transposed layout)
#
# X-axis: chromosomes (chr1..chrN), naturally sorted left to right
# Y-axis: rows â€” Reference at top, then assemblies in FOFN order
# Ribbons flow vertically between adjacent rows.
# For polyploid references, each subgenome gets its own tab and PDF.
# =========================================================================

# --- Assembly contig lookup (incl. original_name for name mapping) ---
asm_contig_lookup <- list()
for (i in seq_along(asm_name_list)) {
  nm <- asm_name_list[i]
  df <- per_asm_summaries[[i]]
  if (!is.null(df)) {
    lookup <- df %>%
      filter(classification == "chrom_assigned") %>%
      select(contig, original_name, assigned_ref_id, reversed, length) %>%
      mutate(assembly = nm, reversed = (reversed == "yes"))
    asm_contig_lookup[[nm]] <- lookup
  }
}
asm_lookup_df <- bind_rows(asm_contig_lookup)

# --- Fix per-assembly macro_blocks: map original_name -> new_name ---
if (!is.null(per_asm_macro_df) && nrow(asm_lookup_df) > 0) {
  name_map <- asm_lookup_df %>%
    distinct(assembly, original_name, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    select(assembly, original_name, new_name = contig)
  per_asm_macro_df <- per_asm_macro_df %>%
    left_join(name_map, by = c("assembly", "contig" = "original_name")) %>%
    mutate(contig_new = coalesce(new_name, contig))
} else if (!is.null(per_asm_macro_df)) {
  per_asm_macro_df <- per_asm_macro_df %>% mutate(contig_new = contig)
}

# --- Build contig_new â†’ scaffold name mapping ---
# Maps (assembly, renamed_contig_name) â†’ scaffold_name for contigs that are
# components of multi-component scaffolds.  Used for ribbon pill matching.
if (!is.null(all_agp_df) && nrow(all_agp_df) > 0 && nrow(asm_lookup_df) > 0) {
  agp_components <- all_agp_df %>%
    filter(type == "W") %>%
    select(assembly, component, scaffold)
  # Map component (original name) â†’ renamed name via asm_lookup_df
  comp_renamed <- agp_components %>%
    left_join(
      asm_lookup_df %>%
        select(assembly, original_name, contig_new = contig) %>%
        distinct(),
      by = c("assembly", "component" = "original_name")
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(contig_new), contig_new != scaffold)
  if (nrow(comp_renamed) > 0) {
    contig_to_scaffold <- setNames(
      comp_renamed$scaffold,
      paste(comp_renamed$assembly, comp_renamed$contig_new, sep = "\x01")
    )
  }
}

# --- Fix pairwise macro_blocks: map original contig names -> renamed names ---
if (!is.null(pairwise_macro_df) && nrow(asm_lookup_df) > 0) {
  left_map <- asm_lookup_df %>%
    distinct(assembly, original_name, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    select(left_assembly = assembly, original_name, new_ref_id = contig)
  right_map <- asm_lookup_df %>%
    distinct(assembly, original_name, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    select(right_assembly = assembly, original_name, new_contig = contig)
  pairwise_macro_df <- pairwise_macro_df %>%
    left_join(left_map, by = c("left_assembly", "ref_id" = "original_name")) %>%
    mutate(ref_id = coalesce(new_ref_id, ref_id)) %>%
    select(-new_ref_id) %>%
    left_join(right_map, by = c("right_assembly", "contig" = "original_name")) %>%
    mutate(contig = coalesce(new_contig, contig)) %>%
    select(-new_contig)
}

# --- Reference-origin lookup for pairwise ribbon coloring ---
# For each assembly contig, build sorted intervals of (qstart, qend, ref_chrom_id)
# from the per-assembly macro_blocks (refâ†’asm).  Used to determine which reference
# chromosome a pairwise synteny block originates from, enabling reference-origin
# coloring through translocations.
#
# Per-assembly macro_blocks have coordinates on the ORIGINAL (unoriented) contig.
# Pairwise macro_blocks use the ORIENTED contig (from chrs.fasta).  For reversed
# contigs, we must flip: oriented_pos = contig_len - original_pos.
ref_origin_lookup <- NULL
if (!is.null(per_asm_macro_df) && nrow(per_asm_macro_df) > 0 &&
    "contig_new" %in% names(per_asm_macro_df) && nrow(asm_lookup_df) > 0) {
  # Get orientation and length per (assembly, contig)
  orient_map <- asm_lookup_df %>%
    distinct(assembly, contig, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    select(assembly, contig_new = contig, reversed, orient_len = length)

  # Only include per-assembly blocks with substantial span (â‰Ą50kb) â€” small
  # blocks from repetitive elements or conserved gene families would
  # otherwise cause spurious coloring (e.g., a 10kb hit to chr8A on a
  # chr2A contig).  Uses the same 50kb threshold as ribbon min_span.
  ref_origin_lookup <- per_asm_macro_df %>%
    filter(!is.na(chrom_id) & nzchar(chrom_id),
           as.numeric(qspan_bp) >= 50000) %>%
    mutate(
      orig_qstart = as.numeric(qstart),
      orig_qend = as.numeric(qend)
    ) %>%
    inner_join(orient_map, by = c("assembly", "contig_new")) %>%
    mutate(
      orient_len = as.numeric(orient_len),
      # Flip coordinates for reversed contigs so they match the oriented FASTA
      qstart = ifelse(reversed, orient_len - orig_qend,   orig_qstart),
      qend   = ifelse(reversed, orient_len - orig_qstart, orig_qend)
    ) %>%
    transmute(
      assembly,
      contig = contig_new,
      qstart, qend,
      ref_chrom_id = chrom_id,
      union_bp = as.numeric(union_bp)
    ) %>%
    arrange(assembly, contig, qstart)

  # Pre-split into named list for O(1) lookup by (assembly, contig)
  ref_origin_idx <- split(ref_origin_lookup,
    paste(ref_origin_lookup$assembly, ref_origin_lookup$contig, sep = "\x01"))
}

# Helper: look up reference chromosome origin for a query region.
# Returns a data frame of (qstart, qend, ref_chrom_id) segments, splitting
# the query region at translocation boundaries so each segment gets the
# correct reference chromosome color.
# Uses pre-indexed ref_origin_idx for O(1) hash lookup instead of dplyr filter.
lookup_ref_origin_segments <- function(asm, ctg, q_start, q_end) {
  na_result <- list(qstart = q_start, qend = q_end,
                    cid = NA_character_, total_bp = 0)
  if (!exists("ref_origin_idx") || is.null(ref_origin_idx)) return(na_result)

  tbl <- ref_origin_idx[[paste(asm, ctg, sep = "\x01")]]
  if (is.null(tbl) || nrow(tbl) == 0) return(na_result)

  # Base R interval overlap (no dplyr/tibble in hot path)
  t_qs <- tbl$qstart; t_qe <- tbl$qend; t_cid <- tbl$ref_chrom_id
  mask <- t_qe > q_start & t_qs < q_end
  if (!any(mask)) return(na_result)

  h_qs <- t_qs[mask]; h_qe <- t_qe[mask]; h_cid <- t_cid[mask]
  clipped_start <- pmax(h_qs, q_start)
  clipped_end <- pmin(h_qe, q_end)
  overlap <- clipped_end - clipped_start
  keep <- overlap > 0
  if (!any(keep)) return(na_result)

  cids <- h_cid[keep]; cs <- clipped_start[keep]; ce <- clipped_end[keep]; ov <- overlap[keep]

  # Aggregate by ref_chrom_id
  uq <- unique(cids)
  s_qs <- vapply(uq, function(c) min(cs[cids == c]), numeric(1))
  s_qe <- vapply(uq, function(c) max(ce[cids == c]), numeric(1))
  s_bp <- vapply(uq, function(c) sum(ov[cids == c]), numeric(1))
  ord <- order(s_qs)
  list(qstart = s_qs[ord], qend = s_qe[ord], cid = uq[ord], total_bp = s_bp[ord])
}

# Simple wrapper for cases that just need a single chrom_id
lookup_ref_origin <- function(asm, ctg, q_start, q_end) {
  segs <- lookup_ref_origin_segments(asm, ctg, q_start, q_end)
  if (length(segs$cid) == 0 || all(is.na(segs$cid))) return(NA_character_)
  segs$cid[which.max(segs$total_bp)]
}

# --- Nuclear chromosomes sorted by (subgenome, chrom_num) ---

if (has_named_subgenomes) {
  nuc_ref <- ref_lengths %>%
    filter(!is.na(subgenome) & subgenome != "NA") %>%
    mutate(chrom_num = as.numeric(str_extract(chrom_id, "\\d+"))) %>%
    arrange(subgenome, chrom_num)
} else {
  macro_rids <- unique(per_asm_macro_df$ref_id)
  nuc_ref <- ref_lengths %>%
    filter(ref_id %in% macro_rids) %>%
    mutate(
      subgenome = "all",
      chrom_num = as.numeric(str_extract(ref_id, "\\d+"))
    ) %>%
    arrange(chrom_num)
}

subgenome_order <- unique(nuc_ref$subgenome)
n_subgenomes <- length(subgenome_order)

# --- Determine assemblies per subgenome ---
sg_assemblies <- list()
for (sg in subgenome_order) {
  sg_ref_ids <- nuc_ref %>% filter(subgenome == sg) %>% pull(ref_id)
  asms_with_sg <- asm_lookup_df %>%
    filter(assigned_ref_id %in% sg_ref_ids) %>%
    pull(assembly) %>% unique()
  sg_assemblies[[sg]] <- asm_name_list[asm_name_list %in% asms_with_sg]
}

# --- Chromosome color palette (by chrom_id, shared across subgenomes) ---
unique_chroms <- unique(nuc_ref$chrom_id)
unique_chroms <- unique_chroms[order(as.numeric(str_extract(unique_chroms, "\\d+")))]
n_unique_chroms <- length(unique_chroms)
if (n_unique_chroms <= 9) {
  chrom_pal <- setNames(oi[seq_len(n_unique_chroms)], unique_chroms)
} else {
  chrom_pal <- setNames(
    colorRampPalette(oi[1:9])(n_unique_chroms),
    unique_chroms
  )
}

# Fixed min_span (50kb) â€” proportional scaling is too aggressive for large genomes
min_span <- 50000

# Rescue macro_blocks are pairwise alignments between non-adjacent assemblies
# that bridge gaps in the per-subgenome chain.  They are treated identically
# to normal pairwise data for rendering â€” no visual distinction is needed.

# =========================================================================
# Per-subgenome plot builder
#
# Returns a list(plot, width, height, has_ribbons) for one subgenome.
# Called once per tab (or once for diploids).
# =========================================================================
build_synteny_plot <- function(sg) {
  sg_chr <- nuc_ref %>% filter(subgenome == sg)
  sg_asms <- sg_assemblies[[sg]]
  sg_chrom_nums <- sort(unique(sg_chr$chrom_num))
  n_chroms <- length(sg_chrom_nums)

  # --- Row names: Reference + assemblies ---
  row_names <- c("Reference", sg_asms)
  n_rows <- length(row_names)
  row_spacing <- 1
  row_centers <- setNames(seq_len(n_rows) * row_spacing, row_names)

  # --- X-axis layout: one column per chromosome ---
  # Pill width proportional to contig length.  Column width is the max total
  # pill width across all assemblies (handles multi-copy chromosomes like
  # chr2A_c1 + chr2A_c2 which need more horizontal space).
  max_ref_len <- max(sg_chr$ref_len)
  x_scale <- max_ref_len / 0.8  # ref pill up to 0.8 units for the largest chrom

  # Pre-compute per-chromosome column width: max of ref_len and the widest
  # assembly (sum of contig lengths + inter-pill gaps for all contigs assigned
  # to that ref_id)
  pill_gap <- 0.40  # gap between adjacent pills within the same column
  col_widths <- numeric(length(sg_chrom_nums))
  for (cn_i in seq_along(sg_chrom_nums)) {
    cn <- sg_chrom_nums[cn_i]
    ref_row <- sg_chr %>% filter(chrom_num == cn)
    rid <- ref_row$ref_id[1]
    ref_w <- ref_row$ref_len[1] / x_scale
    max_asm_w <- ref_w
    for (asm in sg_asms) {
      # Check for scaffold â€” use scaffold length instead of fragment sum
      asm_agp_w <- if (!is.null(agp_idx)) agp_idx[[paste(asm, rid, sep = "\x01")]] else NULL
      if (!is.null(asm_agp_w) && nrow(asm_agp_w) > 1) {
        total_w <- max(asm_agp_w$end) / x_scale
      } else {
        asm_contigs <- asm_lookup_df %>%
          filter(assembly == asm, assigned_ref_id == rid)
        n_ctg <- nrow(asm_contigs)
        total_w <- sum(asm_contigs$length) / x_scale +
                   max(0, n_ctg - 1) * pill_gap
      }
      max_asm_w <- max(max_asm_w, total_w)
    }
    col_widths[cn_i] <- max_asm_w
  }
  # Add padding between columns (0.2 units minimum gap)
  col_gap <- 0.2
  chrom_x <- numeric(length(sg_chrom_nums))
  chrom_x[1] <- col_widths[1] / 2
  for (cn_i in seq_along(sg_chrom_nums)[-1]) {
    chrom_x[cn_i] <- chrom_x[cn_i - 1] + col_widths[cn_i - 1] / 2 +
                      col_gap + col_widths[cn_i] / 2
  }
  names(chrom_x) <- as.character(sg_chrom_nums)

  chrom_labels <- sg_chr %>%
    arrange(chrom_num) %>%
    transmute(chrom_num, label = str_replace(ref_id, "^[Cc]hr", "")) %>%
    distinct()

  # --- Build pill data ---
  pills_list <- list()
  join_indicators <- list()  # red vertical lines at scaffold gaps
  pill_lw <- 1.6

  for (cn_i in seq_along(sg_chrom_nums)) {
    cn <- sg_chrom_nums[cn_i]
    x_pos <- chrom_x[as.character(cn)]
    ref_row <- sg_chr %>% filter(chrom_num == cn)
    if (nrow(ref_row) == 0) next
    rid <- ref_row$ref_id[1]
    ref_len <- ref_row$ref_len[1]
    cid <- ref_row$chrom_id[1]
    pill_w <- ref_len / x_scale

    # Reference pill â€” centered on column
    y_ref <- row_centers[["Reference"]]
    pills_list[[length(pills_list) + 1]] <- tibble(
      row_name = "Reference", is_ref = TRUE,
      ref_id = rid, chrom_id = cid, chrom_num = cn, subgenome = sg,
      contig = rid, contig_len = ref_len, reversed = FALSE,
      x_center = x_pos, x_left = x_pos - pill_w/2, x_right = x_pos + pill_w/2,
      y_center = y_ref, pill_width = pill_w,
      tooltip = sprintf("Reference\n%s\n%.2f Mb", rid, ref_len / 1e6)
    )

    # Assembly pills
    for (asm in sg_asms) {
      y_asm <- row_centers[[asm]]
      lk <- asm_lookup_df %>%
        filter(assembly == asm, assigned_ref_id == rid) %>%
        mutate(contig = factor(contig, levels = str_sort(contig, numeric = TRUE))) %>%
        arrange(contig)
      if (nrow(lk) == 0) next

      # Check if this assembly has AGP scaffold(s) for this chromosome.
      # The scaffold name may be the ref_id itself (e.g., "chr7A") or include
      # a query subgenome suffix (e.g., "chr7A_B" for scaffolded fragments
      # of the secondary subgenome).  Collect all matching scaffolds.
      scaffold_names <- character(0)
      if (!is.null(agp_idx)) {
        # Direct match: scaffold == rid (primary or single copy)
        if (!is.null(agp_idx[[paste(asm, rid, sep = "\x01")]]))
          scaffold_names <- c(scaffold_names, rid)
        # Query subgenome variants: rid_B, rid_C, etc.
        qs_suffixes <- unique(lk$contig)
        qs_bases <- unique(sub("_[fc]\\d+$", "", qs_suffixes))
        qs_bases <- setdiff(qs_bases, rid)  # exclude primary (already checked)
        for (qb in qs_bases) {
          if (!is.null(agp_idx[[paste(asm, qb, sep = "\x01")]]))
            scaffold_names <- c(scaffold_names, qb)
        }
      }

      # Render scaffolded pills (one per scaffold with >1 component)
      scaffolded_contigs <- character(0)  # track which contigs are in scaffolds
      for (sc_name in scaffold_names) {
        sc_agp <- agp_idx[[paste(asm, sc_name, sep = "\x01")]]
        if (is.null(sc_agp) || nrow(sc_agp) <= 1) next

        scaffold_len <- max(sc_agp$end)
        scaffold_w <- scaffold_len / x_scale
        n_components <- sum(sc_agp$type == "W")
        component_names <- paste(
          sc_agp %>% filter(type == "W") %>% pull(component),
          collapse = ", ")
        # Track the original component names for exclusion from fragment pills
        scaffolded_contigs <- c(scaffolded_contigs,
          sc_agp %>% filter(type == "W") %>% pull(component))

        # Compute pill x-position: use column center for primary, offset for secondary
        n_scaffolds <- length(scaffold_names)
        sc_idx <- which(scaffold_names == sc_name)
        if (n_scaffolds == 1) {
          sc_x <- x_pos
        } else {
          # Stack multiple scaffolds left-to-right within the column
          total_w_all <- sum(vapply(scaffold_names, function(sn) {
            sa <- agp_idx[[paste(asm, sn, sep = "\x01")]]
            if (is.null(sa) || nrow(sa) <= 1) return(0)
            max(sa$end) / x_scale
          }, numeric(1))) + max(0, n_scaffolds - 1) * pill_gap
          # Recalculate per-scaffold position
          sc_cursor <- x_pos - total_w_all / 2
          for (si in seq_along(scaffold_names)) {
            sa <- agp_idx[[paste(asm, scaffold_names[si], sep = "\x01")]]
            sw <- if (!is.null(sa) && nrow(sa) > 1) max(sa$end) / x_scale else 0
            if (scaffold_names[si] == sc_name) {
              sc_x <- sc_cursor + sw / 2
              break
            }
            sc_cursor <- sc_cursor + sw + pill_gap
          }
        }

        pills_list[[length(pills_list) + 1]] <- tibble(
          row_name = asm, is_ref = FALSE,
          ref_id = rid, chrom_id = cid, chrom_num = cn, subgenome = sg,
          contig = sc_name, contig_len = scaffold_len, reversed = FALSE,
          x_center = sc_x, x_left = sc_x - scaffold_w/2,
          x_right = sc_x + scaffold_w/2,
          y_center = y_asm, pill_width = scaffold_w,
          tooltip = sprintf("%s\n%s (scaffold, %d components)\n%.2f Mb\n%s",
                            asm, sc_name, n_components, scaffold_len / 1e6,
                            component_names)
        )

        # Gap positions â†’ red join indicators
        gaps <- sc_agp[sc_agp$type %in% c("U", "N"), , drop = FALSE]
        if (nrow(gaps) > 0) {
          for (gi in seq_len(nrow(gaps))) {
            gap_mid <- (gaps$start[gi] + gaps$end[gi]) / 2
            gap_x <- sc_x - scaffold_w/2 + (gap_mid / scaffold_len) * scaffold_w
            join_indicators[[length(join_indicators) + 1]] <- tibble(
              x = gap_x, y_center = y_asm, row_name = asm, chrom_id = cid
            )
          }
        }
      }

      # Exclude contigs that were rendered as part of a scaffold
      if (length(scaffolded_contigs) > 0) {
        lk <- lk %>% filter(!(original_name %in% scaffolded_contigs))
      }

      if (nrow(lk) > 0) {
        # Fragment mode: stack left-to-right, centered on column
        n_ctg <- nrow(lk)
        total_w <- sum(lk$length) / x_scale + max(0, n_ctg - 1) * pill_gap
        x_cursor <- x_pos - total_w / 2

        for (ci in seq_len(n_ctg)) {
          ctg <- lk[ci, ]
          ctg_w <- ctg$length / x_scale
          pills_list[[length(pills_list) + 1]] <- tibble(
            row_name = asm, is_ref = FALSE,
            ref_id = rid, chrom_id = cid, chrom_num = cn, subgenome = sg,
            contig = ctg$contig, contig_len = ctg$length,
            reversed = ctg$reversed,
            x_center = x_cursor + ctg_w / 2,
            x_left = x_cursor, x_right = x_cursor + ctg_w,
            y_center = y_asm, pill_width = ctg_w,
            tooltip = sprintf("%s\n%s\n%.2f Mb", asm, ctg$contig, ctg$length / 1e6)
          )
          x_cursor <- x_cursor + ctg_w + pill_gap
        }
      }
    }
  }

  all_join_indicators <- if (length(join_indicators) > 0) bind_rows(join_indicators) else NULL

  all_pills <- bind_rows(pills_list)
  if (nrow(all_pills) == 0) return(NULL)

  # --- Helpers ---
  pos_to_x <- function(pos, seq_len, pill_x_left, pill_w) {
    pill_x_left + (pos / seq_len) * pill_w
  }

  # Transposed ribbon: flows vertically (topâ†’bottom) between rows.
  # Uses n_pts=10 for a 20-point polygon (10 forward + 10 reversed).
  # Returns raw vectors instead of a tibble â€” caller accumulates into
  # pre-allocated buffers to avoid bind_rows of thousands of small frames.
  n_pts <- 20L
  t_seq <- seq(0, 1, length.out = n_pts)
  s_seq <- 0.5 - 0.5 * cos(pi * t_seq)
  pts_per_ribbon <- 2L * n_pts

  # Per-ribbon metadata for tooltip merging (indexed by group_id)
  # Consecutive ribbons with the same (top_row, top_contig, bot_row, bot_contig, chrom_id)
  # will share a merged tooltip showing the aggregate span.
  ribbon_meta <- list()  # ribbon_meta[[group_id]] = list(top_row, top_ctg, bot_row, bot_ctg, cid, l_start, l_end, r_start, r_end, union_bp, ident, strand)

  # Pre-allocated ribbon buffers (grown in chunks if needed)
  buf_cap <- 50000L  # initial capacity in points
  r_x <- numeric(buf_cap)
  r_y <- numeric(buf_cap)
  r_chrom_id <- character(buf_cap)
  r_alpha <- numeric(buf_cap)
  r_tooltip <- character(buf_cap)
  r_subgenome <- character(buf_cap)
  r_data_id <- character(buf_cap)
  r_group_id <- integer(buf_cap)
  r_idx <- 0L  # next write position

  grow_buf <- function() {
    new_cap <<- length(r_x) * 2L
    r_x <<- c(r_x, numeric(new_cap - length(r_x)))
    r_y <<- c(r_y, numeric(new_cap - length(r_y)))
    r_chrom_id <<- c(r_chrom_id, character(new_cap - length(r_chrom_id)))
    r_alpha <<- c(r_alpha, numeric(new_cap - length(r_alpha)))
    r_tooltip <<- c(r_tooltip, character(new_cap - length(r_tooltip)))
    r_subgenome <<- c(r_subgenome, character(new_cap - length(r_subgenome)))
    r_data_id <<- c(r_data_id, character(new_cap - length(r_data_id)))
    r_group_id <<- c(r_group_id, integer(new_cap - length(r_group_id)))
  }

  append_ribbon <- function(gap_top, gap_bot,
                            top_x_left, top_x_right,
                            bot_x_left, bot_x_right,
                            chrom_id_val, alpha_val, tooltip_text,
                            subgenome_val, data_id_val, group_id_val) {
    y_fwd <- gap_top + t_seq * (gap_bot - gap_top)
    left_fwd  <- top_x_left  + s_seq * (bot_x_left  - top_x_left)
    right_fwd <- top_x_right + s_seq * (bot_x_right - top_x_right)
    xs <- c(left_fwd, rev(right_fwd))
    ys <- c(y_fwd, rev(y_fwd))

    end_idx <- r_idx + pts_per_ribbon
    if (end_idx > length(r_x)) grow_buf()
    rng <- (r_idx + 1L):end_idx
    r_x[rng] <<- xs
    r_y[rng] <<- ys
    r_chrom_id[rng] <<- chrom_id_val
    r_alpha[rng] <<- alpha_val
    r_tooltip[rng] <<- tooltip_text
    r_subgenome[rng] <<- subgenome_val
    r_data_id[rng] <<- data_id_val
    r_group_id[rng] <<- group_id_val
    r_idx <<- end_idx
  }

  # --- Build gap zones between adjacent rows ---
  gap_zones <- list()
  gap_meta  <- list()
  for (ri in seq_len(n_rows - 1)) {
    top_row <- row_names[ri]
    bot_row <- row_names[ri + 1]
    gap_zones[[ri]] <- c(row_centers[[top_row]] + 0.03,
                         row_centers[[bot_row]] - 0.03)
    gap_meta[[ri]] <- list(
      top_row = top_row, bot_row = bot_row,
      top_is_ref = (top_row == "Reference"),
      top_asm = if (top_row == "Reference") NA_character_ else top_row,
      bot_asm = bot_row
    )
  }

  # --- Pill lookup for ribbon building ---
  pill_lookup <- all_pills %>%
    select(row_name, ref_id, chrom_id, chrom_num, contig, contig_len, reversed,
           x_center, x_left, x_right, y_center, pill_width, subgenome)

  # Pre-index pill_lookup for O(1) access in the ribbon loop
  pill_idx <- split(pill_lookup,
    paste(pill_lookup$row_name, pill_lookup$contig, sep = "\x01"))
  # Presence set for (row_name, chrom_id) â€” used by non-adjacent ribbon coverage check
  pill_chrom_set <- unique(paste(pill_lookup$row_name, pill_lookup$chrom_id, sep = "\x01"))

  # Pre-split pairwise macro_blocks by (left_assembly, right_assembly) for O(1) lookup
  pairwise_by_pair <- if (!is.null(pairwise_macro_df)) {
    pw_filtered <- pairwise_macro_df %>% filter(qspan_bp >= min_span)
    if (n_subgenomes > 1) pw_filtered <- pw_filtered %>% filter(subgenome == sg)
    split(pw_filtered, paste(pw_filtered$left_assembly, pw_filtered$right_assembly, sep = "\x01"))
  } else { NULL }

  # Pre-split per-assembly macro_blocks by assembly for O(1) lookup
  per_asm_by_asm <- if (!is.null(per_asm_macro_df)) {
    split(per_asm_macro_df, per_asm_macro_df$assembly)
  } else { NULL }

  # --- Build ribbon polygons ---
  ribbon_idx <- 0

  for (gap_i in seq_along(gap_zones)) {
    gz <- gap_zones[[gap_i]]
    gm <- gap_meta[[gap_i]]

    # Gather macro_blocks for this row pair
    if (gm$top_is_ref) {
      bot_asm <- gm$bot_asm
      macro_src <- if (!is.null(per_asm_by_asm)) per_asm_by_asm[[bot_asm]] else NULL
      if (!is.null(macro_src) && n_subgenomes > 1) {
        sg_ref_ids <- sg_chr$ref_id
        macro_src <- macro_src[macro_src$ref_id %in% sg_ref_ids, , drop = FALSE]
      }
    } else {
      top_asm <- gm$top_asm
      bot_asm <- gm$bot_asm
      macro_src <- if (!is.null(pairwise_by_pair))
        pairwise_by_pair[[paste(top_asm, bot_asm, sep = "\x01")]] else NULL
    }

    if (is.null(macro_src) || nrow(macro_src) == 0) next

    # Pre-extract column vectors to avoid per-row tibble subsetting (major perf win)
    ms_ref_id    <- as.character(macro_src$ref_id)
    ms_contig_new <- if ("contig_new" %in% names(macro_src)) as.character(macro_src$contig_new) else NULL
    ms_contig    <- as.character(macro_src$contig)
    ms_ref_start <- as.numeric(macro_src$ref_start)
    ms_ref_end   <- as.numeric(macro_src$ref_end)
    ms_qstart    <- as.numeric(macro_src$qstart)
    ms_qend      <- as.numeric(macro_src$qend)
    ms_strand    <- as.character(macro_src$strand)
    ms_identity  <- as.numeric(macro_src$identity)
    ms_union_bp  <- as.numeric(macro_src$union_bp)
    n_blk <- nrow(macro_src)

    for (b in seq_len(n_blk)) {
      b_ref_id <- ms_ref_id[b]
      bp_ctg <- if (gm$top_is_ref && !is.null(ms_contig_new)) ms_contig_new[b] else ms_contig[b]

      tp_key <- paste(gm$top_row, b_ref_id, sep = "\x01")
      bp_key <- paste(gm$bot_row, bp_ctg, sep = "\x01")
      tp <- pill_idx[[tp_key]]
      bp <- pill_idx[[bp_key]]
      # Fallback: if contig name is a scaffold component, look up the scaffold pill
      if ((is.null(tp) || nrow(tp) == 0) && !is.null(contig_to_scaffold)) {
        sc <- contig_to_scaffold[paste(gm$top_row, b_ref_id, sep = "\x01")]
        if (!is.na(sc)) tp <- pill_idx[[paste(gm$top_row, sc, sep = "\x01")]]
      }
      if ((is.null(bp) || nrow(bp) == 0) && !is.null(contig_to_scaffold)) {
        sc <- contig_to_scaffold[paste(gm$bot_row, bp_ctg, sep = "\x01")]
        if (!is.na(sc)) bp <- pill_idx[[paste(gm$bot_row, sc, sep = "\x01")]]
      }
      if (is.null(tp) || is.null(bp) || nrow(tp) == 0 || nrow(bp) == 0) next

      top_len <- tp$contig_len[1]; top_xl <- tp$x_left[1]; top_w <- tp$pill_width[1]
      bot_len <- bp$contig_len[1]; bot_xl <- bp$x_left[1]; bot_w <- bp$pill_width[1]
      l_start <- ms_ref_start[b]; l_end <- ms_ref_end[b]
      r_start <- ms_qstart[b];    r_end <- ms_qend[b]
      if (gm$top_is_ref && isTRUE(bp$reversed[1])) {
        r_tmp <- bot_len - r_end; r_end <- bot_len - r_start; r_start <- r_tmp
      }
      l_start <- max(0, l_start); l_end <- min(top_len, l_end)
      r_start <- max(0, r_start); r_end <- min(bot_len, r_end)
      if (l_end <= l_start || r_end <= r_start) next

      strand_val <- ms_strand[b]
      if (gm$top_is_ref && isTRUE(bp$reversed[1])) {
        strand_val <- if (strand_val == "+") "-" else "+"
      }
      ident_val <- ms_identity[b]
      alpha_ribbon <- 0.8 + 0.15 * min(1, ident_val)

      # Determine reference-origin color(s).  For refâ†’asm, use the
      # reference pill directly.  For asmâ†’asm pairwise, split the block
      # at translocation boundaries so each sub-segment gets the correct
      # reference chromosome color.
      if (gm$top_is_ref) {
        cs_frac_start <- 0; cs_frac_end <- 1
        cs_cid <- as.character(tp$chrom_id[1])
        n_cs <- 1L
      } else {
        segs <- lookup_ref_origin_segments(
          gm$bot_asm, as.character(bp$contig[1]), r_start, r_end)
        if (length(segs$cid) == 0 || all(is.na(segs$cid))) {
          cs_frac_start <- 0; cs_frac_end <- 1
          cs_cid <- as.character(bp$chrom_id[1])
          n_cs <- 1L
        } else {
          block_span <- r_end - r_start
          cs_frac_start <- pmax(0, (segs$qstart - r_start) / block_span)
          cs_frac_end   <- pmin(1, (segs$qend   - r_start) / block_span)
          keep <- cs_frac_end > cs_frac_start
          cs_frac_start <- cs_frac_start[keep]
          cs_frac_end <- cs_frac_end[keep]
          cs_cid <- segs$cid[keep]
          n_cs <- length(cs_cid)
          if (n_cs == 0) {
            cs_frac_start <- 0; cs_frac_end <- 1
            cs_cid <- as.character(bp$chrom_id[1])
            n_cs <- 1L
          }
        }
      }

      # Draw one ribbon per color segment
      for (seg_i in seq_len(n_cs)) {
        frac_s <- cs_frac_start[seg_i]
        frac_e <- cs_frac_end[seg_i]
        cid <- cs_cid[seg_i]

        # Interpolate top and bottom x-coordinates for this fraction
        seg_tx_left  <- pos_to_x(l_start + frac_s * (l_end - l_start), top_len, top_xl, top_w)
        seg_tx_right <- pos_to_x(l_start + frac_e * (l_end - l_start), top_len, top_xl, top_w)
        seg_bx_left  <- pos_to_x(r_start + frac_s * (r_end - r_start), bot_len, bot_xl, bot_w)
        seg_bx_right <- pos_to_x(r_start + frac_e * (r_end - r_start), bot_len, bot_xl, bot_w)

        if (strand_val == "-") {
          tmp <- seg_bx_left; seg_bx_left <- seg_bx_right; seg_bx_right <- tmp
        }

        seg_l_start <- l_start + frac_s * (l_end - l_start)
        seg_l_end   <- l_start + frac_e * (l_end - l_start)
        seg_r_start <- r_start + frac_s * (r_end - r_start)
        seg_r_end   <- r_start + frac_e * (r_end - r_start)

        ribbon_idx <- ribbon_idx + 1
        append_ribbon(
          gz[1], gz[2], seg_tx_left, seg_tx_right, seg_bx_left, seg_bx_right,
          chrom_id_val = cid, alpha_val = alpha_ribbon,
          tooltip_text = "", subgenome_val = sg,
          data_id_val = cid, group_id_val = ribbon_idx
        )
        ribbon_meta[[ribbon_idx]] <- list(
          top_row = gm$top_row, top_ctg = tp$contig[1],
          bot_row = gm$bot_row, bot_ctg = bp$contig[1],
          cid = cid, l_start = seg_l_start, l_end = seg_l_end,
          r_start = seg_r_start, r_end = seg_r_end,
          union_bp = ms_union_bp[b],
          ident = ident_val, strand = strand_val)
      }
    }
  }

  # --- Non-adjacent pairwise ribbons ---
  # Pairwise alignments between non-adjacent assemblies (bridging gaps in the
  # per-subgenome chain) are treated identically to adjacent-row ribbons.
  # Skip blocks where all intermediate rows have pills for the chromosome
  # (adjacent ribbons already cover those).
  if (!is.null(pairwise_macro_df)) {
    # Collect adjacent pairs already drawn
    adjacent_pair_keys <- character(0)
    for (ri in seq_along(gap_meta)) {
      gm_adj <- gap_meta[[ri]]
      if (!gm_adj$top_is_ref) {
        adjacent_pair_keys <- c(adjacent_pair_keys,
          paste(gm_adj$top_asm, gm_adj$bot_asm, sep = "\x01"))
      }
    }

    nonadj_pairs <- pairwise_macro_df %>%
      distinct(left_assembly, right_assembly) %>%
      mutate(key = paste(left_assembly, right_assembly, sep = "\x01")) %>%
      filter(!(key %in% adjacent_pair_keys),
             left_assembly %in% row_names,
             right_assembly %in% row_names)

    for (rp_i in seq_len(nrow(nonadj_pairs))) {
      r_top_asm <- nonadj_pairs$left_assembly[rp_i]
      r_bot_asm <- nonadj_pairs$right_assembly[rp_i]
      pair_df <- pairwise_by_pair[[paste(r_top_asm, r_bot_asm, sep = "\x01")]]
      if (is.null(pair_df) || nrow(pair_df) == 0) next

      # Intermediate rows for coverage check
      top_idx <- which(row_names == r_top_asm)
      bot_idx <- which(row_names == r_bot_asm)
      mid_rows <- if (length(top_idx) == 1 && length(bot_idx) == 1 && bot_idx - top_idx > 1) {
        row_names[(top_idx + 1):(bot_idx - 1)]
      } else { character(0) }
      gz_span <- c(row_centers[[r_top_asm]] + 0.03,
                   row_centers[[r_bot_asm]] - 0.03)

      # Pre-extract column vectors
      pd_ref_id   <- as.character(pair_df$ref_id)
      pd_contig   <- as.character(pair_df$contig)
      pd_ref_start <- as.numeric(pair_df$ref_start)
      pd_ref_end  <- as.numeric(pair_df$ref_end)
      pd_qstart   <- as.numeric(pair_df$qstart)
      pd_qend     <- as.numeric(pair_df$qend)
      pd_strand   <- as.character(pair_df$strand)
      pd_identity <- as.numeric(pair_df$identity)
      pd_union_bp <- as.numeric(pair_df$union_bp)

      for (b in seq_len(nrow(pair_df))) {
        tp <- pill_idx[[paste(r_top_asm, pd_ref_id[b], sep = "\x01")]]
        bp <- pill_idx[[paste(r_bot_asm, pd_contig[b], sep = "\x01")]]
        if ((is.null(tp) || nrow(tp) == 0) && !is.null(contig_to_scaffold)) {
          sc <- contig_to_scaffold[paste(r_top_asm, pd_ref_id[b], sep = "\x01")]
          if (!is.na(sc)) tp <- pill_idx[[paste(r_top_asm, sc, sep = "\x01")]]
        }
        if ((is.null(bp) || nrow(bp) == 0) && !is.null(contig_to_scaffold)) {
          sc <- contig_to_scaffold[paste(r_bot_asm, pd_contig[b], sep = "\x01")]
          if (!is.na(sc)) bp <- pill_idx[[paste(r_bot_asm, sc, sep = "\x01")]]
        }
        if (is.null(tp) || is.null(bp) || nrow(tp) == 0 || nrow(bp) == 0) next

        top_len <- tp$contig_len[1]; top_xl <- tp$x_left[1]; top_w <- tp$pill_width[1]
        bot_len <- bp$contig_len[1]; bot_xl <- bp$x_left[1]; bot_w <- bp$pill_width[1]
        ref_cid <- lookup_ref_origin(
          r_bot_asm, as.character(bp$contig[1]), pd_qstart[b], pd_qend[b])
        cid <- if (!is.na(ref_cid)) ref_cid else as.character(bp$chrom_id[1])

        # Skip if all intermediate rows have pills for this chromosome
        if (length(mid_rows) > 0) {
          mid_covered <- all(vapply(mid_rows, function(mr) {
            paste(mr, cid, sep = "\x01") %in% pill_chrom_set
          }, logical(1)))
          if (mid_covered) next
        }

        l_start <- max(0, pd_ref_start[b])
        l_end   <- min(top_len, pd_ref_end[b])
        r_start <- max(0, pd_qstart[b])
        r_end   <- min(bot_len, pd_qend[b])
        if (l_end <= l_start || r_end <= r_start) next
        tx_left  <- pos_to_x(l_start, top_len, top_xl, top_w)
        tx_right <- pos_to_x(l_end,   top_len, top_xl, top_w)
        bx_left  <- pos_to_x(r_start, bot_len, bot_xl, bot_w)
        bx_right <- pos_to_x(r_end,   bot_len, bot_xl, bot_w)
        strand_val <- pd_strand[b]
        if (strand_val == "-") { tmp <- bx_left; bx_left <- bx_right; bx_right <- tmp }
        ident_val <- pd_identity[b]
        alpha_ribbon <- 0.8 + 0.15 * min(1, ident_val)

        ribbon_idx <- ribbon_idx + 1
        append_ribbon(
          gz_span[1], gz_span[2], tx_left, tx_right, bx_left, bx_right,
          chrom_id_val = cid, alpha_val = alpha_ribbon,
          tooltip_text = "", subgenome_val = sg,
          data_id_val = cid, group_id_val = ribbon_idx
        )
        ribbon_meta[[ribbon_idx]] <- list(
```
