```{r synteny_setup, eval=has_synteny_data, include=FALSE}
          top_row = r_top_asm, top_ctg = tp$contig[1],
          bot_row = r_bot_asm, bot_ctg = bp$contig[1],
          cid = cid, l_start = l_start, l_end = l_end,
          r_start = r_start, r_end = r_end,
          union_bp = pd_union_bp[b],
          ident = ident_val, strand = strand_val)
      }
    }
  }

  # --- Merge tooltips for consecutive same-connection ribbons ---
  # Group consecutive ribbons sharing (top_row, top_ctg, bot_row, bot_ctg, cid)
  # into one tooltip showing the aggregate span. Translocations (different cid)
  # break the grouping naturally.
  if (length(ribbon_meta) > 0) {
    n_ribbons <- length(ribbon_meta)
    merged_tooltips <- character(n_ribbons)
    group_start <- 1
    for (ri in seq_len(n_ribbons)) {
      m <- ribbon_meta[[ri]]
      is_last <- (ri == n_ribbons)
      # Check if next ribbon continues the same connection
      same_group <- FALSE
      if (!is_last) {
        nx <- ribbon_meta[[ri + 1]]
        same_group <- (m$top_row == nx$top_row && m$top_ctg == nx$top_ctg &&
                       m$bot_row == nx$bot_row && m$bot_ctg == nx$bot_ctg &&
                       identical(m$cid, nx$cid))
      }
      if (!same_group) {
        # End of group: compute aggregate span from group_start..ri
        grp <- ribbon_meta[group_start:ri]
        agg_l_min <- min(vapply(grp, function(g) g$l_start, numeric(1)))
        agg_l_max <- max(vapply(grp, function(g) g$l_end, numeric(1)))
        agg_r_min <- min(vapply(grp, function(g) g$r_start, numeric(1)))
        agg_r_max <- max(vapply(grp, function(g) g$r_end, numeric(1)))
        agg_bp <- sum(vapply(grp, function(g) g$union_bp, numeric(1)))
        med_ident <- median(vapply(grp, function(g) g$ident, numeric(1)))
        n_blocks <- length(grp)
        cid <- m$cid
        tip <- sprintf(
          "%s %s\n  %s  %.2f\u2013%.2f Mb\n\u2192\n%s %s\n  %s  %.2f\u2013%.2f Mb\n%.2f Mb | %d block(s) | Identity: %.1f%%",
          m$top_row, m$top_ctg,
          if (!is.na(cid)) cid else "", agg_l_min / 1e6, agg_l_max / 1e6,
          m$bot_row, m$bot_ctg,
          if (!is.na(cid)) cid else "", agg_r_min / 1e6, agg_r_max / 1e6,
          agg_bp / 1e6, n_blocks, med_ident * 100
        )
        merged_tooltips[group_start:ri] <- tip
        group_start <- ri + 1
      }
    }
    # Write merged tooltips into the ribbon buffer â€” only set on the first
    # point of each polygon group.  ggiraph reads the tooltip from any
    # non-empty value in the group, so setting it once avoids serializing
    # the full tooltip string 20Ă— per ribbon (n_pts Ă— 2 points each).
    for (ri in seq_len(n_ribbons)) {
      pt_start <- (ri - 1L) * pts_per_ribbon + 1L
      if (pt_start <= r_idx) {
        r_tooltip[pt_start] <- merged_tooltips[ri]
      }
    }
  }

  # Build ribbon data frame from pre-allocated buffers (avoids bind_rows of
  # thousands of small tibbles which is O(nÂ˛) in dplyr/vctrs).
  has_ribbons <- r_idx > 0
  if (has_ribbons) {
    rng <- seq_len(r_idx)
    all_ribbons <- data.frame(
      x = r_x[rng], y = r_y[rng],
      chrom_id = r_chrom_id[rng], alpha = r_alpha[rng],
      tooltip = r_tooltip[rng], subgenome = r_subgenome[rng],
      data_id = r_data_id[rng], group_id = r_group_id[rng],
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  } else {
    all_ribbons <- NULL
  }

  # --- Plot sizing ---
  plot_w <- 7.2
  plot_h <- max(4, n_rows * 0.6 + 1)

  # --- Compose the plot ---
  p <- ggplot()

  # Ribbons (behind pills)
  if (has_ribbons) {
    p <- p +
      geom_polygon_interactive(
        data = all_ribbons,
        aes(x = x, y = y, group = group_id, fill = chrom_id,
            alpha = alpha, tooltip = tooltip, data_id = data_id),
        show.legend = FALSE
      ) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = chrom_pal, guide = "none") +
      scale_alpha_identity()
  }

  # Reference pills (darker)
  ref_pills <- all_pills %>% filter(is_ref)
  p <- p +
    geom_segment(
      data = ref_pills,
      aes(x = x_left, xend = x_right, y = y_center, yend = y_center),
      linewidth = pill_lw, lineend = "round", color = "grey55"
    )

  # Assembly pills (lighter, interactive)
  asm_pills <- all_pills %>% filter(!is_ref)
  if (nrow(asm_pills) > 0) {
    p <- p +
      geom_segment_interactive(
        data = asm_pills,
        aes(x = x_left, xend = x_right, y = y_center, yend = y_center,
            tooltip = tooltip, data_id = chrom_id),
        linewidth = pill_lw, lineend = "round", color = "grey78"
      )
  }

  # Scaffold join indicators (red vertical lines at gap positions)
  if (!is.null(all_join_indicators) && nrow(all_join_indicators) > 0) {
    join_half_h <- pill_lw * 0.02  # match pill visual height
    p <- p +
      geom_segment_interactive(
        data = all_join_indicators,
        aes(x = x, xend = x,
            y = y_center - join_half_h, yend = y_center + join_half_h,
            data_id = chrom_id),
        linewidth = 0.4, color = "red"
      )
  }

  # X-axis: chromosome labels
  chrom_breaks <- chrom_x[as.character(chrom_labels$chrom_num)]
  p <- p +
    scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = chrom_breaks,
      labels = chrom_labels$label,
      sec.axis = dup_axis(),
      expand = expansion(add = c(0.5, 0.5))
    )

  # Y-axis: row labels (Reference + assemblies)
  p <- p +
    scale_y_reverse(
      breaks = as.numeric(row_centers),
      labels = names(row_centers),
      expand = expansion(add = c(0.2, 0.2))
    )

  # Theme
  p <- p +
    theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_pt, base_family = base_family) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x.bottom = element_text(size = base_font_pt, face = "bold",
                                       family = base_family, margin = margin(t = 2)),
      axis.text.x.top = element_text(size = base_font_pt, face = "bold",
                                      family = base_family, margin = margin(b = 2)),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = base_font_pt, family = base_family, hjust = 1),
      axis.ticks = element_blank(),
      axis.title = element_blank(),
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 2, 5)
    )

  list(plot = p, width = plot_w, height = plot_h, has_ribbons = has_ribbons)
}
```

```{r synteny_description, eval=has_synteny_data, results='asis'}
cat('<p class="section-intro">\n')
cat(sprintf("Chromosome synteny between the reference and each assembly (%s mode). ",
            params$synteny_mode))
if (n_subgenomes > 1) {
  cat("Each subgenome is shown in a separate tab. ")
}
cat("Ribbons connect syntenic macro-blocks between adjacent rows. ")
cat("Color indicates the reference chromosome; opacity reflects alignment identity. ")
cat("Crossed ribbons indicate inversions.\n")
cat("</p>\n")
```

```{r synteny_riparian, eval=has_synteny_data, results='asis'}
for (sg_i in seq_along(subgenome_order)) {
  sg <- subgenome_order[sg_i]

  # Emit tab header for polyploid
  if (n_subgenomes > 1) {
    cat(sprintf("\n## Subgenome %s\n\n", sg))
  }

  result <- build_synteny_plot(sg)
  if (is.null(result) || !result$has_ribbons) {
    cat("No ribbon connections could be built for this subgenome.\n\n")
    next
  }

  # Save PDF (one per subgenome)
  pdf_suffix <- if (n_subgenomes > 1) {
    paste0(".chromosome_synteny.", sg, ".pdf")
  } else {
    ".chromosome_synteny.pdf"
  }
  pdf_path <- paste0(params$out_prefix, pdf_suffix)
  save_pdf(pdf_path, result$plot, width = result$width, height = result$height)

  # Render interactive HTML widget
  g <- ggiraph::girafe(ggobj = result$plot,
                       width_svg = min(13, result$width + 2),
                       height_svg = result$height)
  g <- ggiraph::girafe_options(g,
    ggiraph::opts_tooltip(css = paste0(
      "font-family: ", base_family, "; font-size: 9pt; ",
      "background: white; padding: 6px; border: 1px solid #666;"
    )),
    ggiraph::opts_hover(css = "opacity: 0.8;"),
    ggiraph::opts_hover_inv(css = "opacity: 0.15;"),
    ggiraph::opts_toolbar(saveaspng = FALSE)
  )
  cat(as.character(htmltools::as.tags(g)))
  cat("\n\n")
}
```

```{r synteny_empty, eval=(has_synteny_data && length(subgenome_order) == 0)}
cat("Synteny data available but no ribbon connections could be built. ",
    "This may indicate that assemblies have very different chromosome structures.")
```


`r if (has_any_chrom && has_per_asm) "# 4. Quality {.tabset}" else ""`

```{r quality_section, eval=(has_any_chrom && has_per_asm)}
chrom_df <- all_summary_df %>%
  filter(classification == "chrom_assigned")

# Join subgenome info
if (has_subgenomes && "assigned_subgenome" %in% names(chrom_df)) {
  chrom_df <- chrom_df %>%
    mutate(sg = ifelse(is.na(assigned_subgenome) | assigned_subgenome == "NA",
                       "Other", assigned_subgenome))
} else {
  chrom_df$sg <- "All"
}

has_identity <- "seq_identity_vs_ref" %in% names(chrom_df) &&
                !all(is.na(chrom_df$seq_identity_vs_ref))
has_collin   <- "collinearity_score" %in% names(chrom_df) &&
                !all(is.na(chrom_df$collinearity_score))
has_gc_dev   <- "gc_deviation" %in% names(chrom_df) &&
                !all(is.na(chrom_df$gc_deviation))

# Compute composite sort key for assembly ordering
# Primary: median identity across first subgenome, secondary: others
asm_sort_key <- chrom_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(seq_identity_vs_ref)) %>%
  group_by(assembly) %>%
  summarise(median_ident = median(seq_identity_vs_ref, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(median_ident))
asm_quality_order <- if (nrow(asm_sort_key) > 0) asm_sort_key$assembly else asm_names

n_sg_facets <- length(unique(chrom_df$sg))
```

```{r quality_identity, eval=(has_any_chrom && has_per_asm && exists("has_identity") && has_identity), results='asis'}
cat("## Sequence Identity\n\n")
```

```{r quality_identity_plot, eval=(has_any_chrom && has_per_asm && exists("has_identity") && has_identity), fig.width=10, fig.height=max(3, n_asm * 0.3 + 1.5)}
ident_df <- chrom_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(seq_identity_vs_ref)) %>%
  mutate(assembly = factor(assembly, levels = rev(asm_quality_order)),
         value = seq_identity_vs_ref * 100)

p_ident <- ggplot(ident_df, aes(x = value, y = assembly, fill = sg, color = sg)) +
  geom_density_ridges(alpha = 0.6, scale = 1.4, linewidth = 0.4,
                      rel_min_height = 0.01,
                      quantile_lines = TRUE, quantiles = 2,
                      from = 0.4, to = 1.0) +
  { if (has_subgenomes && n_sg_facets > 1) {
    list(
      facet_wrap(~ sg, ncol = n_sg_facets),
      scale_fill_manual(values = sg_cols_light, guide = "none"),
      scale_color_manual(values = sg_cols_dark, guide = "none")
    )
  } else {
    list(
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("All" = lighten(oi[5], 0.4)), guide = "none"),
      scale_color_manual(values = c("All" = oi[5]), guide = "none")
    )
  }} +
  labs(x = "Sequence identity vs reference (%)", y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_pt, base_family = base_family) +
  axis_theme +
  theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank())

p_ident
```

```{r quality_collinearity, eval=(has_any_chrom && has_per_asm && exists("has_collin") && has_collin), results='asis'}
cat("## Collinearity\n\n")
```

```{r quality_collinearity_plot, eval=(has_any_chrom && has_per_asm && exists("has_collin") && has_collin), fig.width=10, fig.height=max(3, n_asm * 0.3 + 1.5)}
collin_df <- chrom_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(collinearity_score)) %>%
  mutate(assembly = factor(assembly, levels = rev(asm_quality_order)),
         value = collinearity_score * 100)

p_collin <- ggplot(collin_df, aes(x = value, y = assembly, fill = sg, color = sg)) +
  geom_density_ridges(alpha = 0.6, scale = 1.4, linewidth = 0.4,
                      rel_min_height = 0.01,
                      quantile_lines = TRUE, quantiles = 2,
                      from = 0.4, to = 1.0) +
  { if (has_subgenomes && n_sg_facets > 1) {
    list(
      facet_wrap(~ sg, ncol = n_sg_facets),
      scale_fill_manual(values = sg_cols_light, guide = "none"),
      scale_color_manual(values = sg_cols_dark, guide = "none")
    )
  } else {
    list(
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("All" = lighten(oi[5], 0.4)), guide = "none"),
      scale_color_manual(values = c("All" = oi[5]), guide = "none")
    )
  }} +
  labs(x = "Collinearity (%)", y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_pt, base_family = base_family) +
  axis_theme +
  theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank())

p_collin
```

```{r quality_gc, eval=(has_any_chrom && has_per_asm && exists("has_gc_dev") && has_gc_dev), results='asis'}
cat("## GC Deviation\n\n")
```

```{r quality_gc_plot, eval=(has_any_chrom && has_per_asm && exists("has_gc_dev") && has_gc_dev), fig.width=10, fig.height=max(3, n_asm * 0.3 + 1.5)}
gc_df <- chrom_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(gc_deviation)) %>%
  mutate(assembly = factor(assembly, levels = rev(asm_quality_order)),
         value = abs(gc_deviation))

p_gc <- ggplot(gc_df, aes(x = value, y = assembly, fill = sg, color = sg)) +
  geom_density_ridges(alpha = 0.6, scale = 1.4, linewidth = 0.4,
                      rel_min_height = 0.01,
                      quantile_lines = TRUE, quantiles = 2,
                      from = 0.4, to = 1.0) +
  { if (has_subgenomes && n_sg_facets > 1) {
    list(
      facet_wrap(~ sg, ncol = n_sg_facets),
      scale_fill_manual(values = sg_cols_light, guide = "none"),
      scale_color_manual(values = sg_cols_dark, guide = "none")
    )
  } else {
    list(
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("All" = lighten(oi[5], 0.4)), guide = "none"),
      scale_color_manual(values = c("All" = oi[5]), guide = "none")
    )
  }} +
  labs(x = "|GC deviation| (std devs from reference)", y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_pt, base_family = base_family) +
  axis_theme +
  theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank())

p_gc
```


`r if (has_any_depth) "# 5. Read Depth" else ""`

```{r depth_section, eval=(has_any_depth && has_per_asm), fig.width=10, fig.height=max(3, n_asm * 0.3 + 1.5)}
depth_df <- all_summary_df %>%
  filter(classification == "chrom_assigned", !is.na(depth_mean))

if (nrow(depth_df) > 0) {
  # Add subgenome info
  if (has_subgenomes && "assigned_subgenome" %in% names(depth_df)) {
    depth_df <- depth_df %>%
      mutate(sg = ifelse(is.na(assigned_subgenome) | assigned_subgenome == "NA",
                         "Other", assigned_subgenome))
  } else {
    depth_df$sg <- "All"
  }

  depth_df <- depth_df %>%
    mutate(assembly = factor(assembly, levels = rev(asm_names)))

  n_depth_sg <- length(unique(depth_df$sg))

  p_depth <- ggplot(depth_df, aes(x = depth_mean, y = assembly, fill = sg, color = sg)) +
    geom_density_ridges(alpha = 0.6, scale = 1.4, linewidth = 0.4,
                        rel_min_height = 0.01,
                        quantile_lines = TRUE, quantiles = 2) +
    { if (has_subgenomes && n_depth_sg > 1) {
      list(
        facet_wrap(~ sg, ncol = n_depth_sg),
        scale_fill_manual(values = sg_cols_light, guide = "none"),
        scale_color_manual(values = sg_cols_dark, guide = "none")
      )
    } else {
      list(
        scale_fill_manual(values = c("All" = lighten(oi[5], 0.4)), guide = "none"),
        scale_color_manual(values = c("All" = oi[5]), guide = "none")
      )
    }} +
    labs(x = "Mean read depth (chromosome contigs)", y = NULL) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_pt, base_family = base_family) +
    axis_theme +
    theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank())

  p_depth
} else {
  cat("No depth data available for chromosome-assigned contigs.")
}
```


`r if (has_per_asm && any(comp_df$n_rdna > 0, na.rm = TRUE)) "# 6. rDNA {.tabset}" else ""`

```{r rdna_setup, eval=(has_per_asm && any(comp_df$n_rdna > 0, na.rm = TRUE)), include=FALSE}
has_any_rdna <- any(comp_df$n_rdna > 0, na.rm = TRUE)
```

```{r rdna_summary_header, eval=(has_per_asm && exists("has_any_rdna") && has_any_rdna), results='asis'}
cat("## Summary\n\n")
```

```{r rdna_summary, eval=(has_per_asm && exists("has_any_rdna") && has_any_rdna)}
rdna_tbl <- comp_df %>%
  transmute(
    Assembly = assembly,
    rdna_mb = round(rdna_bp / 1e6, 2),
    `Contigs` = n_rdna,
    `Arrays` = n_rdna_arrays
  )

max_rdna_mb <- max(rdna_tbl$rdna_mb, na.rm = TRUE)

rdna_tbl %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    `Total (Mb)` = {
      pct <- if (max_rdna_mb > 0) min(100, rdna_mb / max_rdna_mb * 100) else 0
      bar_cell(pct, oi[1], sprintf("%.2f", rdna_mb), alpha = 0.3)
    }
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(Assembly, `Total (Mb)`, Contigs, Arrays) %>%
  gt() %>%
  fmt(columns = `Total (Mb)`, fns = function(x) lapply(x, html)) %>%
  cols_align(align = "right", columns = c(Contigs, Arrays)) %>%
  cols_width(`Total (Mb)` ~ px(140)) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = css(vertical_align = "middle"),
    locations = cells_body()
  ) %>%
  tab_header(title = md("**rDNA Summary**")) %>%
  gt_theme()
```

```{r rdna_arrays_header, eval=(has_per_asm && exists("has_any_rdna") && has_any_rdna && has_rdna_arrays), results='asis'}
cat("## Array Detail\n\n")
```

```{r rdna_arrays_table, eval=(has_per_asm && exists("has_any_rdna") && has_any_rdna && has_rdna_arrays)}
# Map original contig names to new (renamed) names via per-assembly summaries
name_map <- all_summary_df %>%
  distinct(assembly, original_name, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  select(assembly, original_name, new_name = contig)

arr_tbl <- all_rdna_arrays_df %>%
  rename(original_name = contig) %>%
  left_join(name_map, by = c("assembly", "original_name")) %>%
  mutate(contig = if_else(!is.na(new_name), new_name, original_name)) %>%
  transmute(
    Assembly = assembly,
    `Array ID` = array_id,
    Contig = contig,
    `Original Name` = original_name,
    `N copies` = n_total,
    Strand = strand,
    `Span (kb)` = span_kb
  )

arr_tbl %>%
  gt() %>%
  gt_theme() %>%
  tab_header(title = md("**rDNA Array Details**")) %>%
  cols_align(align = "right", columns = c(`N copies`, `Span (kb)`))
```


`r if (has_per_asm && any(comp_df$chrC_found == "yes" | comp_df$chrM_found == "yes", na.rm = TRUE)) "# 7. Organelles" else ""`

```{r organelle_section, eval=(has_per_asm && any(comp_df$chrC_found == "yes" | comp_df$chrM_found == "yes", na.rm = TRUE))}
# Extract organelle contigs from per-assembly data
org_df <- all_summary_df %>%
  filter(classification == "organelle_complete") %>%
  mutate(
    org_type = case_when(
      grepl("chrC|Pt|chloro|plast", assigned_ref_id, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "chrC",
      grepl("chrM|Mt|mito", assigned_ref_id, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "chrM",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(assembly, org_type) %>%
  summarise(
    n_contigs = n(),
    total_bp = sum(length, na.rm = TRUE),
    contigs = paste(contig, collapse = ", "),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    assembly = as.character(assembly),
    total_mb = total_bp / 1e6
  )

# Build wide table with bar cells for chrC and chrM
org_wide <- comp_df %>%
  transmute(Assembly = assembly) %>%
  left_join(
    org_df %>% filter(org_type == "chrC") %>%
      transmute(Assembly = assembly, chrC_bp = total_bp, chrC_contigs = contigs),
    by = "Assembly"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    org_df %>% filter(org_type == "chrM") %>%
      transmute(Assembly = assembly, chrM_bp = total_bp, chrM_contigs = contigs),
    by = "Assembly"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    chrC_bp = replace_na(chrC_bp, 0),
    chrM_bp = replace_na(chrM_bp, 0),
    chrC_contigs = replace_na(chrC_contigs, "\u2014"),
    chrM_contigs = replace_na(chrM_contigs, "\u2014")
  )

max_chrC_bp <- max(org_wide$chrC_bp, na.rm = TRUE)
max_chrM_bp <- max(org_wide$chrM_bp, na.rm = TRUE)

# chrM unit: Kb if max >= 1 Mb, else plain bp with commas
chrM_use_kb <- max_chrM_bp >= 1e6
chrM_col_label <- if (chrM_use_kb) "Size (Kb)" else "Size (bp)"

# Chloroplast color: green-tinted, Mitochondria: red-tinted

org_gt_df <- org_wide %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    chrC_size = if (chrC_bp > 0) {
      pct <- min(100, chrC_bp / max_chrC_bp * 100)
      bar_cell(pct, oi[3], formatC(chrC_bp, format = "d", big.mark = ","))
    } else "\u2014",
    chrM_size = if (chrM_bp > 0) {
      pct <- min(100, chrM_bp / max_chrM_bp * 100)
      val_text <- if (chrM_use_kb) {
        formatC(round(chrM_bp / 1e3), format = "d", big.mark = ",")
      } else {
        formatC(chrM_bp, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
      }
      bar_cell(pct, oi[4], val_text)
    } else "\u2014",
    chrC_contig = chrC_contigs,
    chrM_contig = chrM_contigs
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(Assembly, chrC_contig, chrC_size, chrM_contig, chrM_size)

# Dynamic column labels
chrC_size_label <- "Size (bp)"

# Detect plastid visibility (reuse from overview table if available)
show_chrC_org <- exists("show_chrC") && show_chrC

if (show_chrC_org) {
  org_gt_df %>%
    gt() %>%
    fmt(columns = c(chrC_size, chrM_size), fns = function(x) lapply(x, html)) %>%
    cols_label(
      chrC_contig = "Contig", chrC_size = chrC_size_label,
      chrM_contig = "Contig", chrM_size = chrM_col_label
    ) %>%
    cols_width(chrC_size ~ px(140), chrM_size ~ px(140)) %>%
    tab_spanner(label = "Chloroplast", columns = c(chrC_contig, chrC_size)) %>%
    tab_spanner(label = "Mitochondria", columns = c(chrM_contig, chrM_size)) %>%
    tab_style(
      style = css(vertical_align = "middle"),
      locations = cells_body()
    ) %>%
    tab_header(title = md("**Organelle Summary**")) %>%
    gt_theme()
} else {
  org_gt_df %>%
    select(Assembly, chrM_contig, chrM_size) %>%
    gt() %>%
    fmt(columns = chrM_size, fns = function(x) lapply(x, html)) %>%
    cols_label(chrM_contig = "Contig", chrM_size = chrM_col_label) %>%
    cols_width(chrM_size ~ px(140)) %>%
    tab_spanner(label = "Mitochondria", columns = c(chrM_contig, chrM_size)) %>%
    tab_style(
      style = css(vertical_align = "middle"),
      locations = cells_body()
    ) %>%
    tab_header(title = md("**Organelle Summary**")) %>%
    gt_theme()
}
```


`r if (has_any_contam) "# 8. Contaminants {.tabset}" else ""`

`r if (has_any_contam) "## Summary" else ""`

```{r contamination, eval=has_any_contam}
contam_tbl <- comp_df %>%
  filter(n_contaminants > 0) %>%
  transmute(
    Assembly = assembly,
    contam_mb = round(contaminant_bp / 1e6, 2),
    Contigs = n_contaminants,
    Species = n_contaminant_species
  )

max_contam_mb <- max(contam_tbl$contam_mb, na.rm = TRUE)

contam_tbl %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    `Total (Mb)` = {
      pct <- if (max_contam_mb > 0) min(100, contam_mb / max_contam_mb * 100) else 0
      bar_cell(pct, oi[7], sprintf("%.2f", contam_mb))
    }
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(Assembly, `Total (Mb)`, Contigs, Species) %>%
  gt() %>%
  fmt(columns = `Total (Mb)`, fns = function(x) lapply(x, html)) %>%
  cols_align(align = "right", columns = c(Contigs, Species)) %>%
  cols_width(`Total (Mb)` ~ px(140)) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = css(vertical_align = "middle"),
    locations = cells_body()
  ) %>%
  tab_header(title = md("**Contamination Summary**")) %>%
  gt_theme()
```

`r if (has_any_contam && has_contam_detail) "## Top Taxa" else ""`

```{r top_taxa, eval=(has_any_contam && has_contam_detail), results='asis'}
# --- Top genera by prevalence across assemblies ---
genus_prevalence <- all_contam_detail_df %>%
  filter(nzchar(genus) & !is.na(genus)) %>%
  distinct(assembly, genus) %>%
  group_by(genus) %>%
  summarise(n_assemblies = n(),
            asm_list = paste(sort(assembly), collapse = "\n"),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(pct = n_assemblies / n_asm * 100) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_assemblies), genus) %>%
  head(10)

genus_asm_tips <- genus_prevalence$asm_list

genus_gt <- genus_prevalence %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(bar = bar_cell(pct, oi[7], sprintf("%.0f%%", pct), alpha = 0.3)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  transmute(Genus = genus, `% assemblies` = bar, n = n_assemblies) %>%
  gt() %>%
  fmt(columns = `% assemblies`, fns = function(x) lapply(x, html)) %>%
  text_transform(
    locations = cells_body(columns = Genus),
    fn = function(x) sprintf(
      '<span title="%s" style="white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;display:block;max-width:120px"><i>%s</i> spp.</span>',
      x, x)
  ) %>%
  text_transform(
    locations = cells_body(columns = n),
    fn = function(x) mapply(
      function(v, tip) sprintf('<span title="%s">%s</span>', gsub('"', '&quot;', tip), v),
      x, genus_asm_tips[seq_along(x)], SIMPLIFY = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  cols_align(align = "right", columns = n) %>%
  cols_width(Genus ~ px(120), `% assemblies` ~ px(150), n ~ px(40)) %>%
  tab_header(title = md("**Top Genera**")) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = css(vertical_align = "middle"),
    locations = cells_body()
  ) %>%
  gt_theme()

# --- Top species by prevalence across assemblies ---
species_prevalence <- all_contam_detail_df %>%
  filter(nzchar(species) & !is.na(species)) %>%
  mutate(binomial = paste(genus, species)) %>%
  distinct(assembly, binomial) %>%
  group_by(binomial) %>%
  summarise(n_assemblies = n(),
            asm_list = paste(sort(assembly), collapse = "\n"),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(pct = n_assemblies / n_asm * 100) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_assemblies), binomial) %>%
  head(10)

species_asm_tips <- species_prevalence$asm_list

species_gt <- species_prevalence %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(bar = bar_cell(pct, oi[7], sprintf("%.0f%%", pct), alpha = 0.3)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  transmute(Species = binomial, `% assemblies` = bar, n = n_assemblies) %>%
  gt() %>%
  fmt(columns = `% assemblies`, fns = function(x) lapply(x, html)) %>%
  text_transform(
    locations = cells_body(columns = Species),
    fn = function(x) sprintf(
      '<span title="%s" style="white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;display:block;max-width:200px"><i>%s</i></span>',
      x, x)
  ) %>%
  text_transform(
    locations = cells_body(columns = n),
    fn = function(x) mapply(
      function(v, tip) sprintf('<span title="%s">%s</span>', gsub('"', '&quot;', tip), v),
      x, species_asm_tips[seq_along(x)], SIMPLIFY = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  cols_align(align = "right", columns = n) %>%
  cols_width(Species ~ px(200), `% assemblies` ~ px(150), n ~ px(40)) %>%
  tab_header(title = md("**Top Species**")) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = css(vertical_align = "middle"),
    locations = cells_body()
  ) %>%
  gt_theme()

# Render side by side using a two-column HTML layout
cat('<div style="display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: flex-start; flex-wrap: wrap;">\n')
cat('<div style="flex: 1; min-width: 300px;">\n')
cat(as.character(as_raw_html(genus_gt)))
cat('\n</div>\n')
cat('<div style="flex: 1; min-width: 300px;">\n')
cat(as.character(as_raw_html(species_gt)))
cat('\n</div>\n')
cat('</div>\n')
```


---

<div class="note-box">
Generated by **final_finalizer** multi-assembly comparison &mdash; `r Sys.Date()`
</div>
